name: 5150 High Stimulant Pre-Workout
description_html:
THE 'STIM-CRAZY' PRE-WORKOUT

5150® High-Stim Pre-Workout is engineered for serious stimulant users and advanced athletes who demand no compromise. Powered by a “Stim-Crazy” caffeine complex (8 caffeine sources) delivering over 400 mg of caffeine per serving, this formula blends sustained energy, pump support, and cognitive edge.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Stim-Crazy Caffeine Complex (513 mg total, ~400 mg effective): combines fast- and slow-release caffeine sources to support prolonged energy without dramatic crashes.
  • Pump & Vascular Support: L-Citrulline, Taurine, and Nitric Oxide–boosting agents help enhance muscle fullness and nutrient delivery.
  • Endurance & Fatigue Buffering: Beta-Alanine helps buffer lactic acid buildup so you can push longer.
  • Mental Drive & Focus: N-Acetyl L-Tyrosine and nootropics help sharpen mental clarity and reduce distractions during training.

Flavors

Why Choose 5150®?

If average pre-workouts don’t push you far enough, 5150® is designed to take you to the next level of effort. Just be sure your body and mindset are ready for the intensity.

Ingredient Breakdown

Consisting of Caffeine Anhydrous, Dicaffeine Malate, Theobromine, Green Tea, Yerba Mate Extract, Guarana Extract, Green Coffee Bean Extract, and Gotu Kola Extract. This is a precise combination of eight types of caffeine, sourced specifically to create a smooth, extended energy curve while effectively eliminating caffeine jitters and the “caffeine crash” that accompanies most highly caffeinated products.

Prepare yourself for what’s next, blasting yourself into a gym session fueled by a blend of caffeine from 8 sources:

Cocoabuterol® is a new dietary weight loss supplement to activate thermogenic fat burning within the body while boosting your energy and mood. The natural alkaloids in Cocoabuterol® can significantly increase cAMP via beta-adrenoceptors, thereby activating thermogenic fat-burning and muscle-building functions. This translates to fat burning PLUS support for the building of lean muscle tissue without the side effects.

Compared with caffeine, Cocoabuterol® doesn’t have the edginess often associated with caffeine, while it lasts longer and similarly balances the onramp and offramp of caffeine into your body, enhancing caffeine’s most desirable qualities. Because Cocoabuterol® acts to smooth out the caffeine curve, you’re unlikely to experience the shakes and jitteriness associated with excessive caffeine consumption.

Commonly used as a fast-acting energy source, Caffeine Anhydrous has appeared in many of the best pre-workouts and energy-based products. This ingredient will assist with mental alertness by stimulating the central nervous system, enhancing your energy output in a short time.

What makes Di-Caffeine Malate such an effective ingredient for prolonged energy output centers on the time-release properties. Like caffeine, Di-Caffeine Malate helps improve energy levels and mental focus. Best of all, Di-Caffeine Malate helps endurance and stamina, supplying you with energy when you need it most during hardcore training.

Theobromine is similar in structure to caffeine and falls into the same class of methylxanthine compounds. Although theobromine is similar in structure to caffeine, it’s only about 1/10th the strength of caffeine.

Theobromine is somewhat unique in that, compared to most stimulants, it's actually been shown to decrease blood pressure. It has mild vasodilatory properties, similar to those of the amino acid Arginine, and is believed to increase blood flow.

Caffeine sourced from Green Tea leaves, Yerba Mate Extract, Guarana Seed Extract (Paullinia cupana), African Snakeroot (Rauwolfia vomitoria)(leaves), Green Coffee Bean Extract (Seed), and Gotu Kola Extract (Centella asiatica).

name: 5150 High Stimulant Pre-Workout (intl)
description_html:
WELCOME TO 5150® HIGH-STIM PRE-WORKOUT

If you’re a true master of the craft and lifting is your life then you already know 5% Nutrition is the only LIFESTYLE to GROW by. The very name of this product should be warning enough that you’re heading into deeper waters.

What is the meaning of 5150®?

Rich Piana originally went with the name “5150®” for this ultra-high stimulant pre-workout because he wanted to convey that this pre-workout was not for the ordinary, but for only the serious stim junkies among us. And while Rich wasn’t insinuating that taking a few scoops of 5150® pre-workout would result in a 72-hour “involuntary psychiatric hold”, he wanted to convey that this product meant business!

Have you grown bored of other pre-workouts, having ‘tried them all’ before getting this point?
Do the results you seek lay beyond the normal conditions of training?
Do you need to focus and energize your workout while hydrating your muscles and keeping your body anabolic?

If yes, then you may have met the qualifications to start training like a true 5%ER; to enter the territory where only a few thrive: mass monster territory. If you routinely seek the pain of a long training session and routinely need to be spotted by at least two smaller freaks of the gym, then we’d like to welcome you to 5150® High-Stim Pre-Workout.

STIM-CRAZY CAFFEINE COMPLEX - 513 mg

Consisting of Caffeine Anhydrous, Dicaffeine Malate, Theobromine, Green Tea, Yerba Mate Extract, Guarana Extract, Green Coffee Bean Extract, and Gotu Kola Extract. This is a precise combination of eight types of caffeine and sourced specifically to create a smooth, extended energy curve while effectively eliminating the jitters of caffeine and the “caffeine crash” that accompanies most highly caffeinated products.

This supercharged formula will have the stim-junkies lined up, again! With just a single scoop of 5150® over 400mg of total caffeine will begin to take hold and course through your veins. Prepare yourself for what’s next, blasting yourself into a gym session fueled by a blend of caffeine frp, 8 sources:

COCOABUTEROL® Cocoa Alkaloid Extract (Theobroma caco L.)
Cocoabuterol® is a new dietary weight loss supplement to activate thermogenic fat burning within the body while boosting your energy and mood. The natural alkaloids in Cocoabuterol® can significantly increase cAMP via beta-adrenoceptor which activate thermogenic fat burning and muscle building functions. This translates to fat burning PLUS support for the building of lean muscle tissue without the side effects.

Compared with caffeine, Cocoabuterol® doesn’t have the edginess often associated with caffeine while it lasts longer and while similarly balancing the onramp and offramp of caffeine into your body, enhancing caffeine’s most desirable qualities. Because Cocoabuterol® acts to smooth out the caffeine curve, you’re unlikely to experience the shakes and jitteriness associated with excessive caffeine consumption.

CAFFEINE ANHYDROUS
Commonly used as a fast-acting energy source, Caffeine Anhydrous has been used in many of the best pre-workouts and energy-based products alike. This ingredient will assist with mental alertness as it stimulates the central nervous system, making your energy output much more enhanced in a short amount of time.

DI-CAFFEINE MALATE
What makes Di-Caffeine Malate so interesting is the time-released energy production that is so heavily influenced and reflected by this ingredient. Just like caffeine, this specific ingredient helps improve energy levels and mental focus. Best of all, Di-CM helps to improve endurance and stamina, giving you the energy to combat fatigue accrued during your workout.

THEOBROMINE
Theobromine is similar in structure to caffeine and falls into the same class of methylxanthine compounds. Although theobromine is similar in structure to caffeine, it’s only about 1/10th the strength of caffeine.

Theobromine is somewhat unique in that compared to most stimulants, it's actually been shown to decrease blood pressure. It has mild vasodilating properties, similar to the amino acid Arginine, and is believed to increase blood flow.

OTHER SOURCES OF CAFFEINE
Caffeine sourced from Green Tea leaves, Yerba Mate Extract, Guarana Seed Extract (Paullinia cupana), Rauvolfia Canescens (Whole Plant), Green Coffee Bean Extract (Seed), and Gotu Kola Extract (Centella asiatica).

Raw Synephrine HCL powder is a naturally occurring alkaloid chemical compound found in plants and extracted for use as a supplement. Synephrine is sometimes referred to as ‘bitter orange’ as it is derived from small oranges. In actual fact, it is naturally found in the rind of the orange, which is why it is known as “bitter orange”. Bitter orange is currently used for a number similar issues as well as some more modern-day troubles like weight loss and as an aid in the battle against athlete’s foot.

Synephrine hcl enhances the body’s utilization of carbohydrates by producing more energy in the form of ATP. It facilitates cellular uptake of glucose in muscle cells, as well as glycogenolysis, gluconeogenesis, glycolysis, and oxygen uptake. The use of Synephrine hcl will also inhibit the activation of NF-kB, this substance is key in causing inflammatory response in the body. Studies also show that synephrine hcl powder binds to β3-adrenergic receptors, resulting in an increase in the body’s ability to break down fats.

Citrulline is a proven nitric oxide (NO) pump ingredient, delivering sleeve-stretching muscle pump and other great performance-enhancing benefits. Citrulline plays a role in ATP production when your muscles require additional energy. It also helps buffer the buildup of ammonia in muscle, which reduces exercise fatigue and increases workout endurance!

Citrulline has an impact on both the phosphagen and glycolytic energy systems. It can modulate enzymes involved in glycogen breakdown, glycogenolysis, and enzymes that convert glucose to ATP (glycolysis). This action shifts muscle from aerobic to anaerobic metabolism and reduces the rate at which the body uses up ATP and phosphocreatine. This means more energy is available to the muscles for longer periods of time!

Only the upper tier of pre-workouts and sports nutrition products will feature the nootropic alkaloid Huperzine-A to enhance cognitive function levels and neuroprotective properties. Huperzine A is an alkaloid purified from club moss (Huperzia serrata) and boosts focus while training.

This well-known ingredient works indirectly to buffer acid and reduce fatigue by increasing levels of carnosine in the working muscles thereby allowing you to push your reps and sets deep into the growth zone.

Carnosine consists of the amino acids beta-alanine and histidine which occur naturally in the body, and is one of the primary compounds that buffers acid in recently activated muscle tissue. An increase in intramuscular carnosine levels can increase the buffering capacity of a muscle, further delay the onset of muscle fatigue and failure, while improving muscular strength and endurance.

There’s a reason so many energy drinks feature Taurine, namely due to its ability to reduce the acute effect felt by both the jolt of caffeine entering the body and to mitigate the jitteriness. Many consumers of Taurine will agree that it increases the enjoyment of the effects of caffeine. Additionally, it's considered to be an “osmotic agent”, meaning that it draws water into cells. And when cells have a higher water content, they tend to produce more effects related to recovery and anabolism.

Taurine is often included with fat-burning supplements because it can help reduce the side effects of muscle cramping.

N-Acetyl L-Tyrosine (NALT) is an acetylated derivative of the nonessential amino acid, L-Tyrosine, that is used in the process of protein synthesis. Tyrosine is also a precursor of several chemicals and neurotransmitters such as dopamine and norepinephrine.

NALT may also assist in exercise recovery and may help with maintaining healthy weight in already healthy individuals when taken in conjunction with a healthy diet and exercise.* NACT may help in maintaining a healthy mood, contribute to a calm feeling of overall well-being in already healthy individuals, and aid cognition.*

Choline is a molecule mostly used for either its nootropic or cognitive boosting properties (turning into acetylcholine, the learning neurotransmitter) or as a liver health agent, able to reduce fatty liver buildup. Choline is an essential nutrient that is the building block for phosphatidylcholine cellular membranes and the precursor to acetylcholine, which is an important neurotransmitter involved in memory, muscle control, metabolism and transport of lipids.

name: All Day You May 10:1:1 Ratio BCAA Recovery Drink
description_html:
The Industry Standard for Recovery & Growth

ALL DAY YOU MAY® revolutionized the sports nutrition industry when first released and continues to be the standard within recovery drinks. It works by supporting your body in an anabolic (muscle-building) state, providing a constant supply of amino acids for recovery, electrolytes for hydration, and buffers to push past training plateaus, all while supporting vital organs like the liver and joints.

Unlike many recovery drinks available, ALL DAY YOU MAY is packed with BCAAs in a 10:1:1 ratio featuring a huge dose of Leucine to trigger protein synthesis, all nine of the Essential Amino Acids or EAAs for muscle repair and growth, plus Conditionally Essential Amino Acids or CEAAs to promote recovery, prevent muscle breakdown, and boost fat metabolism.

The formula features electrolytes from coconut water, joint support from Glucosamine, and MSM, Milk Thistle for liver support, B vitamins, and endurance enhancing ingredients such as Beta-Alanine. ALL DAY YOU MAY is designed to prevent muscle breakdown, boost hydration, support muscle growth, and protect joints and liver during and after intense training. 

Optimize recovery and maximize muscle growth with the drink mix that can be enjoyed ALL DAY – morning, noon, and evening. Between meals, before a workout, during a training session, and as part of your post-workout or recovery.

BCAA 10:1:1 Ratio Blend

Leucine, Isoleucine, Valine – 6 Grams

Of the three Branched-Chain Amino Acids or BCAAs, Leucine is the one that has the most research supporting its ability to stimulate protein synthesis. We use an innovative 10:1:1 ratio, which means you’re getting a HUGE 5-gram dose of this potent anabolic activator in every serving for maximum effect. The additional two BCAAs work synergistically with Leucine to achieve better results than Leucine alone.(1)

Essential Amino Acid Blend

Phenylalanine, Threonine, Lysine HCl, Histidine HCl, Tryptophan, Methionine – 205 mg

The latest clinical studies indicate that protein synthesis is stimulated to a greater degree if additional EAAs are included, which is why we have added them to the formula.(2)

Conditionally Essential Amino Acid Blend

Glutamine, L-Carnitine L-Tartrate – 2,750 mg

What are CEAAs or Conditionally EAAs? They are amino acids that the body cannot make under certain conditions, such as stress. We can’t think of anything more stressful than the brutally tough workouts you put yourself through several times a week, so it made perfect sense to include them in our ALL DAY YOU MAY formula.

Glutamine – A big part of dealing with the stress of an intense workout is recovery and that’s where the amino acid Glutamine helps you remain in an anabolic state. It also works synergistically with the BCAAs to stimulate protein synthesis, act as an anti-catabolic during training, and promote post-workout recovery.(3)

L-Carnitine L-Tartrate – We’ve included this version of Carnitine because it supports testosterone production and doesn’t get any more anabolic than that!

Amino Acid Support Blend

Taurine, Raw Coconut Water Concentrate, HICA, Bromelain, Blueberry Fruit Powder – 960 mg

Taurine – This is a popular amino acid that’s often included in energy drinks and pre-workouts. We’re using it here for its powerful cell volume effects. Taurine pulls water into the muscles, hyper-hydrating them and blowing them up big time!

Coconut Water Concentrate – If you’re sweating, it means you’re working hard. It also means you’re losing electrolytes. You risk muscle cramps and dehydration if you don’t replace the electrolytes you’ve lost. Coconut Water is a complete fluid replacement ingredient: it has vitamins, key electrolyte minerals, antioxidants, amino acids, and enzymes for advanced hydration.

HICA (Alpha-Hydroxyisocaproic Acid) – This is a metabolite of Leucine that works synergistically with the BCAAs & EAAs to stimulate protein synthesis. Additionally, it binds ammonia in the muscles during hard training, thereby blocking fatigue.(4)

Blueberry Fruit – This is amongst the most effective antioxidants on the market and helps your immune system combat workout-induced free radicals.

Bromelain – This is the digestive enzyme that’s found in pineapple and has been added to ADYM to help you digest the high levels of protein most bodybuilders consume.

Intracellular Buffer Blend

Beta-alanine, Dicalcium Phosphate, Sodium Bicarbonate – 800 mg 

Because training is catabolic, it tears down muscle tissue and depletes glycogen stores. Your muscles react, and a spike in lactic acid levels occurs, lowering pH to prevent further damage. You know this as "muscle failure". We want to interrupt this process so you can push past the point of failure and keep going deep into the growth zone.

The intracellular buffer helps form a barrier between your muscles, and the dramatic increase in lactic acid as your pH decreases helps reduce muscle breakdown.

Joint & Liver Support Blend

D-Glucosamine Sulfate Potassium, MSM, Milk Thistle – 650 mg

You hit it hard whenever you walk into the gym and strap on your belt. You can bet your muscles aren’t the only thing taking a beating. Your joints are too – your knees, elbows, and shoulders the most. That’s why ADYM includes a joint support complex, and we’ve used two of the most powerful joint ingredients available.

name: All Day You May Caffeinated BCAA Recovery Drink
description_html:
All of the same great benefits as All Day You May® with an added 125 mg of caffeine!

All Day You May® Caffeinated gives you everything you expect from an innovative amino formula—yet it packs a 125 mg blend of green tea and PurCaf®, organic caffeine from green coffee beans. Now, you not only have a powerful anabolic tool, you also have energy!

Begin your day with an innovative amino acid formula so you don’t have to worry about drinking your coffee and aminos separately because they’re all in one formula!

This outstanding formula begins with the critically important BCAAs. From there, we added the rest of the essential amino acids (EAAs). Check out these blends and ingredients!

BCAA Blend – 6 Grams

Leucine, Isoleucine, Valine

L-Phenylalanine, L-Threonine, L-Histidine, L-Methionine

Conditionally Essential Amino Acid Blend – 2,750 mg

L-Glutamine, L-Carnitine L-Tartrate

We took the idea of using EAAs a step further. We added the Conditionally Essential Amino Acids (CEAAs), the amino acids that the body can’t make under certain conditions, such as physical or emotional stress.

Glutamine - This is a well-known amino that has a big role in preventing muscle protein breakdown as well as supporting recovery. Glutamine helps you stay in an anabolic state and works synergistically with the BCAAs to stimulate protein synthesis. In fact, Glutamine and the BCAAs make up most of the amino acids in muscle tissue.(3)

L-Carnitine L-Tartrate – We've included this version of Carnitine because it supports testosterone production. LCLT influences muscle growth by increasing the androgen receptor that lets testosterone work more effectively in your body.(4)

Amino Acid Support Blend – 960 mg

L-Taurine, Raw Coconut Water Concentrate, Leucic Acid, Bromelain, Blueberry Fruit Powder

Taurine – This is an amino acid-like compound that’s usually included in pre-workouts and energy drinks. While it has cognitive benefits, it also promotes cell volume. Taurine pulls water into the muscles, hyper-hydrating them and promoting water-based pumps.

Coconut Water Concentrate – If you’re working out and sweating, you need to replace the electrolytes you’re losing. Coconut Water is a complete fluid replacement that contains electrolyte minerals, vitamins, antioxidants, amino acids, and enzymes.

Leucic Acid (Alpha-Hydroxyisocaproic Acid) – Also known as HICA, this is a metabolite of Leucine. Leucic Acid works synergistically with the BCAAs & EAAs to stimulate protein synthesis. Additionally, it binds ammonia in the muscles during hard training, thereby slowing fatigue.(5)

Intra-Cellular Buffer Blend – 800 mg

Beta-Alanine, DiCalcium Phosphate, Sodium Bicarbonate

Joint Support Blend – 600 mg

Natural Energy Blend – 125 mg

Introducing 5% Nutrition All Day You May Stick Packs!

You know all about 5% Nutrition’s legendary All Day You May - our one-of-a-kind growth and recovery supplement. It features our leucine-dominant 6-gram BCAA Blend in the advanced 10:1:1 ratio. This sets up protein synthesis like no other amino product available.

5% Nutrition ADYM Stick Packs – feeding your muscles All Day is now easier than ever. We are light-years ahead of the industry and always have been, and now we can add another notch to our belt with these perfectly convenient on-the-go Stick Packs!

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

One of the innovative features of ADYM Stick Packs is the BCAA ratio of 10:1:1. This is a leucine-heavy ratio with a full 5,000 mg of leucine per serving. That’s huge, especially since leucine directly stimulates protein synthesis. That means gains! The BCAAs make up about 33% of muscle tissue, support recovery, and act as an anti-catabolic by preventing the breakdown of muscle tissue during periods of calorie restriction.(1)

The CEAA Blend – 2750 mg – L-Glutamine, L-Carnitine L-Tartrate

From there, ADYM steps away from the competition even more. Who else but Rich Piana and 5% Nutrition would add CEAAs (Conditionally Essential Amino Acids)? CEAAs are aminos that become essential under certain conditions. These conditions include mental, emotional, and physical stress.

Glutamine 
This amino acid makes up about 60% of muscle tissue. It also contains 19% nitrogen, an important component of protein. Plus, glutamine supports recovery and helps prevent muscle protein breakdown. It also supports protein synthesis. Yep, much like the BCAAs.(2,3)

L-Carnitine L-Tartrate 
This compound supports lipid transport to the mitochondria. L-Carnitine L-Tartrate is also involved in testosterone production. It influences the androgen receptor, which allows testosterone to work more effectively in the body.(4)

Amino Acid Support Blend – 960 mg – L-Taurine, Raw Coconut Water Concentrate, 2-Hydroxyisocaproic Acid (Leucic Acid), Bromelain, Blueberry Fruit Powder

Let’s break down this outstanding Blend! 

Taurine
Technically, this popular compound is an amino sulfonic acid. It’s also an osmolyte. That means it pulls water into the muscles for water-based pumps and improves hydration. You’ve seen taurine in countless energy drinks. Why’s it in there? It enhances focus. Taurine does this by attaching to GABA receptors. Finally, it supports mental engagement.(5,6)

Coconut Water Concentrate
You know you’re working hard if you’re working up a sweat. That also means you’re losing electrolytes. You’ll need to replace the electrolytes you’ve lost, or you’re risking cramps and performance-robbing dehydration. Coconut Water is a complete fluid replacement ingredient with vitamins, key electrolyte minerals, antioxidants, amino acids, and enzymes. All of these work together to keep you hydrated and performing at your best.(7)

Alpha-Hydroxyisocaproic Acid
Also called Leucic Acid or HICA, this ingredient is a metabolite of leucine. It works with the BCAAs & EAAs for optimal protein synthesis activation. Plus, it works with our Intra-Cellular Blend by binding ammonia in the muscles during hard workouts. This helps slow fatigue so that you can train harder.(8)

Blueberry Fruit
You might not always think about your immune system. Still, your immune system has to deal with free radicals that are caused by your workouts. With that knowledge, you can see the advantage of antioxidant protection and how important a healthy immune system really is.

Bromelain
This is a digestive enzyme that comes from pineapple. In ADYM Stick Packs, it helps digest protein. Proper digestion means you get the full benefits of protein.

Intra-Cellular Buffer Blend – 800 mg – Beta-Alanine, Dicalcium Phosphate, Sodium Bicarbonate

Dicalcium Phosphate & Sodium Bicarbonate
Training is by nature catabolic because it tears down your muscle tissue and depletes your glycogen stores. As this happens during your sets, your muscles react by causing increased levels of lactic acid. This lowers pH levels to prevent your muscles from more damage. This is the burn you feel near the end of a set. It’s also the point of failure in your set. We included these ingredients to derail this process. That means you can push past failure and keep your set going.

Beta-Alanine
Everyone knows this ingredient. It seems to be famous for harmless flushing and itching sensations. There’s no reason to worry; we purposely dosed it low to avoid those undesirable sensations. Still, beta-alanine buffers lactic acid by converting it into carnosine in your body. This buffers lactic acid and helps prevent that drop in pH.(9)

All of the ingredients in this blend work together to slow acid buildup in the muscles.

Joint & Liver Support Blend – 650 mg – D-Glucosamine Sulfate Potassium, MSM, Milk Thistle

D-Glucosamine & MSM
Ultimately, how hard you’re capable of training comes down to how your joints are feeling. After all, your muscles aren’t the only thing taking a beating during a workout. Your knee, shoulder, and elbow joints might suffer the most. That’s why we included joint support ingredients.

Milk Thistle
Your liver filters everything you consume. It’s a large vital organ that controls hundreds of bodily functions. In other words, you want maximum liver health and function. We also added milk thistle for optimal liver support.

Essential Amino Acid Blend – 200 mg – L-Phenylalanine, L-Threonine, L-Histidine, L-Methionine, L-Lysine, L-Tryptophan

There are nine total EAAs, and they include the BCAAs. No doubt you know the EAAs must come from diet and supplements like ADYM Stick Packs. Of course, 5% was among the first to include EAAs, BCAAs, and CEAAs in one outstanding formula – All Day You May.(10)

description_html:
When it comes to natural muscle builders, there are several products currently available that like to brag about how hardcore they are. You’ve seen the ads and heard the hype. We’ve listened to it long enough! We decided to step in and show them how the big boys do it. 5% Nutrition has defined the word “hardcore” for years, and now we’ve designed the most potent legal muscle builder on the market – Bigger By The Day®!

We took the strongest legal, all-natural muscle-building ingredients available - including the powerful Turkesterone - yes, you read that right - and combined them into one incredible product. Then we dared to make it stronger than any other product!

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Take a look at these ingredients:

Ajuga Extract (Ajuga turkestanica)(whole herb) – 1,000 mg – We’ve taken this powerful natural muscle builder and added it to the only formula that can handle it - Bigger By The Day®!

In-vitro studies show the effectiveness of this incredible ingredient! One of the primary benefits of Turkesterone is protein synthesis stimulation. Along with increased muscle mass via protein synthesis, Turkesterone supports increased strength. It also has anti-catabolic properties because it helps the body preserve muscle when you’re restricting calories.

That’s quite a list of impressive benefits! With the rest of the hardcore ingredients in this exceptional formula, Bigger By The Day® will make a huge difference in your workouts and results!

Turkesterone works best when taken with a high-protein meal, so make sure you take Bigger By The Day® with your two highest protein meals of the day.(1, 2, 3)

Green Tea Extract (90% Epicatechin) – 300 mg – This ingredient is a flavanol commonly found in dark chocolate and green tea. This compound has muscle growth properties and can stimulate nitric oxide production. We’re talking about increased pumps and enhanced nutrient delivery to your working muscles. One of the primary ways it stimulates growth is by inhibiting myostatin. What is myostatin? It’s a type of protein known as a growth factor that regulates how big your muscles can get. In effect, it puts a ceiling on muscle growth. You can raise the ceiling of your potential for gains by inhibiting myostatin.(4,5)

HICA – 500 mg – This ingredient is also known as A-Hydroxyisocaproic Acid or Leucic Acid. HICA is a metabolite of leucine, which means that when we metabolize leucine, our body breaks down into HICA and other metabolites, such as HMB. Here’s how it works. The leucine that is broken down into HICA is first metabolized into KIC. Then it’s broken down further into HICA; it becomes available for use at this point. Clinical studies have indicated that HICA can stimulate gains and reduce muscle soreness. (6)

Leucine – 200 mg – Leucine is one of the BCAAs and, without a doubt, the most powerful amino acid. It is directly involved in the stimulation of the mTOR pathway, which in turn activates protein synthesis. If gains are your goal, leucine should be very high on your list of supplements.(7) By combining leucine, HICA, and turkesterone, we have created a powerful trio that will effectively stimulate protein synthesis.

Bioperine® Black Pepper Extract – 10 mg – Ultimately, the effectiveness of any product comes down to how well it’s absorbed. Of course, we wanted to be sure this powerful muscle builder is fully absorbed for maximum benefits. This ingredient is well-known as an effective absorption enhancer that improves the absorption of the nutrients and ingredients it’s paired with.(8)

When it comes to the most potent all-natural hardcore muscle builder that was designed for serious results, Bigger By The Day® delivers!

name: Code Red Aminos
description_html:
Your fitness and training journey starts today with Code Red Series Aminos, only from 5% Nutrition. This outstanding product supports muscle growth, helps enhance recovery, and helps prevent muscle protein breakdown during intense training or caloric restriction. Code Red Series Aminos promotes hydration and remains completely stim-free. However, the best part about this product: it tastes great!

Let's begin by setting our objectives and relentlessly working towards attaining them. At 5% Nutrition, we specialize in manufacturing great-tasting and innovative sports nutrition products that help you train and perform at your best. Our Code Red series from 5% Nutrition is a must-try, whether you're an experienced supplement user or just starting out.

What Are Amino Acids?

If you’re new to lifting, you might wonder exactly what amino acids are. Commonly known as the “building blocks” of protein, amino acids are constructed from base elements such as nitrogen, carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen. There are 20 different amino acids used to help make proteins. When you consume a protein food, your digestive system breaks the protein down into amino acids. Then, your body will combine the amino acids into sequences or “chains.” These amino acid chains are responsible for hundreds of vital bodily functions. These functions include supporting muscle growth through protein synthesis and promoting post-workout recovery.(1)

name: Crea-TEN 10-in-1 Creatine
description_html:
Crea-TEN® features a variety of flavors! Crea-TEN is formulated to outperform standard creatine monohydrate by combining multiple forms of creatine with absorption-enhancing compounds. Instead of relying on a single creatine type, this blend aims to maximize uptake and utilization. Because no loading or cycling is necessary, it’s user-friendly and convenient.

It’s no wonder creatine is one of the most widely used supplements ever created; it's also one of the safest, too. Creatine is a cornerstone ingredient and can be found in the supplement arsenal of most bodybuilders and athletes.

There’s Creatine, then there’s Crea-TEN
Creatine Monohydrate is a fantastic product, although it falls short on its own when it comes to absorption. Crea-TEN was formulated to address poor absorption by combining the 10 most effective forms of creatine. Crea-TEN takes creatine monohydrate to a new level.

Our Creatine Accelerate Blend was designed for optimal creatine absorption. In short, creatine is used to increase cell volume, leading to greater muscle mass and enhanced pumps. It also stimulates muscle growth, extends endurance, and improves strength.(1,2,3,4,5) Plus, there’s no loading, as it requires only one serving daily.

Why It Works
Creatine has been shown to increase the muscle’s phosphocreatine stores, a component of the ATP energy system. This translates to improved muscle endurance while training.

Creatine also supports hydration and water-based pumps by pulling water into the muscle cells, causing them to swell. Crea-TEN® redefines how pumped you can get. Additionally, creatine improves strength and supports muscle growth.(1,2,3,4,5)

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description_html:
Creatine Monohydrate, Unflavored

Known as a top-notch ingredient and one of the most well-studied ingredients in all of supplements and sports nutrition. No other supplement has been as researched as Creatine Monohydrate, it proves time and again its benefits and effectiveness.(1)

5% Core Creatine Monohydrate provides 5 grams per serving and comes unflavored so you can control how you mix this powder with your favorite proteins, shakes, and other supplements.

Creatine is single-handedly responsible for the concept of cell volume, or water-based pumps. It supports strength, size, and cellular energy. It also hydrates the muscles. Recent studies have shown even more impressive benefits. Did you know creatine monohydrate also supports cognitive function?(2)

Whether you take it before, during, or after your workout, 5% Core Creatine Monohydrate needs to be in your supplement stack. You know Rich believed in the power of creatine. Now you have a time-tested and proven version at your fingertips!

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Creatine Monohydrate – 5,000 mg

Creatine monohydrate is known as the original “cell volumizer” meaning that it pulls water into the muscles causing them to swell in size. You may have heard this also referred to as “water-based pumps”. The increased cell volume provides several benefits including improved muscle hydration which supports protein synthesis and leads to increased muscle growth!3

Creatine & Performance

Studies show that creatine can support an increase in muscle mass, strength, and exercise performance.1,4 Adding creatine to a training program has been shown to increase strength by 8%, weightlifting performance by 14%, and bench press one-rep max by up to 43% compared to training alone.5

Creatine & ATP Production, Endurance

How does creatine help endurance? It’s stored in the muscles as creatine phosphate and is part of the ATP-CP energy system. This energy system is also called the “Phosphagen System”. Your muscles use the Phosphagen System for short bursts of exercise, such as bodybuilding and weight training. As for ATP, it acts as the immediate energy source for your muscles during these high-intensity workouts. Normally, ATP becomes depleted after 8–10 seconds of high-intensity activity but creatine can help you produce more ATP, allowing you to maintain optimal performance for a few seconds longer.6,7 Increase your sets and your maximum output farther than you thought possible with this well-studied supplement, Creatine Monohydrate.

name: D-Aspartic Acid
description_html:
When it comes to building muscle, nothing beats testosterone

It’s no wonder it’s considered the King of the natural hormones your body produces. As any 5%er most likely knows, testosterone has a range of bodily functions. These include key roles in stimulating muscle growth, enhancing sex drive, and improving stamina.

Yet, there’s a problem. As we start getting older, our natural levels get progressively lower. In this case, beginning to get older means your mid-twenties.

The answer is 5% Nutrition Core D-Aspartic Acid!

One serving of 5% Core D-Aspartic Acid provides 3,120mg per serving. This potent ingredient is one of the most effective natural test boosters available.

Did you think we stopped there? You know us better than that. We also added 200 mg of DIM. What’s better than increasing testosterone and controlling estrogen?

The great thing about Core D-Aspartic Acid is you can stack it with our other test-boosting formulas, namely Core ZMA. Combining these two gives you a powerful testosterone-boosting stack. Based on your goals, you can build your stack from there.

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

D-Aspartic Acid - 3,120mg

This is an essential amino acid that occurs naturally in the testes, hypothalamus, and pituitary glands. There’s one main clinical study that showed an increase in the body’s levels of testosterone using this ingredient. It was conducted on 23 male test subjects. Each test subject was given one 3-gram dose per day. After 12 days, testosterone levels of the test subjects increased on average by 42%. That’s one heck of an increase!(1)

DIM - 50mg

You want estrogen under control when your testosterone levels increase. DIM, or 3,3'-Diindolylmethane, does this by blocking aromatase. This is the enzyme that converts excess levels of testosterone into estrogen. This, of course, leads to unwanted side effects such as bloating and fat gain.(2)

If you want the most out of your program, you want the most out of your body’s natural testosterone production and the place to start is 5% Nutrition Core D-Aspartic Acid.

name: DIM
description_html:
5% Nutrition Core Series DIM is a comprehensive formula that contains 325 mg of 3,3’-Diindolylmethane (DIM). However, we've further enhanced this formula to include ingredients that help DIM be more effective or better absorbed when taken!

What is DIM?

Before we dig into the benefits of DIM, let’s understand that DIM comes from Indole-3-Carbinol. That’s a phytochemical in cruciferous vegetables such as broccoli, kale, Brussels sprouts, and cabbage, which the body breaks down into various molecules; one of those molecules is 3,3’-diindolylmethane (DIM). 

What are the benefits of DIM?

First, it has a positive effect on estrogen regulation by blocking the conversion of excess testosterone into estrogen. Supporting hormone balance, DIM can help reduce the negative side effects of excess estrogen.

When estrogen levels are imbalanced, the body can store excess fat, undermining your goals for a toned, low-fat physique. With proper diet and training, DIM may help shed that extra fat and prevent new fat cells from forming.

A natural energy enhancer, DIM can also support your body's estrogen metabolism, helping you fight fatigue, reduce stress symptoms, and get the focus you need to get through your day.

DIM for Men

If you’re on or ending an aggressive supplement program, no doubt you’re concerned about hormonal balance. Getting your testosterone levels back to normal is a priority. Another priority is controlling estrogen. That’s because excess levels of estrogen in men can lead to several unpleasant problems such as gaining fat around your stomach and “man-boobs”. It also tends to leave you with a lack of energy and slower muscle growth.

The body naturally converts excess testosterone to estrogen by a process called aromatization. Normally, this is a good thing because it helps keep your hormones in balance. However, when you have higher than normal testosterone levels, your estrogen levels also increase.

What happens when you end your cycle? Your natural testosterone levels are low and take time to return to normal. Yet estrogen is reacting to the higher levels of test you had during your cycle. That means estrogen is way too high.

DIM for Women

DIM helps a woman’s body create the right balance of “good estrogens” to “bad estrogens”. Briefly, estrogens are a group of hormones that occur naturally in both men and women. Both men and women need a certain level for normal health. As estrogen breaks down in the body, its metabolites can either help or harm a woman’s health. That’s why they are called “bad” and “good” estrogen metabolites. The “good” estrogen metabolites have high antioxidant activity. The “bad” estrogen metabolites cause unwanted changes in body composition. That means we want to increase the proportion of good metabolites to bad metabolites. DIM supports this process.(1)

Benefits of Estrogen

It should be noted that for both men and women, DIM has been shown to help improve overall metabolism. That’s because it’s a natural regulator of energy metabolism. In other words, it helps convert stored fat into energy. The “Good” estrogens also help reduce inflammation. This can help ease post-workout soreness. These are the positive effects of normal estrogen levels.(2)

PRODUCT INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

DIM - 325 mg

As noted, DIM is derived from Indole-3-Carbinol. That’s a phytochemical found in cruciferous vegetables, such as broccoli. DIM has beneficial effects on estrogen metabolism and helps inhibit testosterone to estrogen conversion. It also helps lower the effects of estrogen on the body. This, in turn, supports hormonal balance and helps prevent muscle loss. These benefits will support your physique goals.(3)

Calcium D-Glucarate - 250 mg

This is a calcium salt made of calcium and glucaric acid. That’s a chemical compound found naturally in the body. It’s also found in foods such as broccoli, oranges, apples, and grapefruit. It works with DIM to amplify its estrogen-regulating effects. It does this by helping to lower levels of estrogen in the body.(4)

Organic Broccoli Powder - 50 mg

This ingredient is high in nutrients such as vitamins C and K. Both DIM and glucaric acid are sourced from vegetables such as broccoli. Research suggests this compound works synergistically with DIM. This ingredient promotes healthy, normal estrogen function.

Bioperine® Black Pepper Extract - 5 mg

This is a patented form of black pepper that enhances the absorption of nutrients. After all, if your body cannot absorb the supplementation you've spent good money to purchase, what's the point!? Be sure to maximize your value and only buy a DIM product with enhanced absorption properties.

name: Digestive Defender
description_html:
No doubt you’re eating a carefully calculated balance of protein, carbohydrates, and fats to optimize your macronutrients while training. In order to maximize the benefits of your diet, supplements, and training you'll have to improve your digestion. Enter 5% Nutrition and our Digestive Defender.

We’ve created a dual digestive formula that outclasses anything else like it! This is a genuine must-have supplement that can make a tremendous difference in your results. Digestive Defender consists of two powerful product formulas: Probio-75 and DIGESTIVE ENZYMES. They can be used in conjunction with one another, or separately, depending on your needs.

PROBIO-75

This is a powerful probiotic and prebiotic formula. A probiotic is a living organism that helps restore healthy bacteria in the gut. A prebiotic supports growth of healthy bacteria. Combined, these compounds dramatically improve gut health.

SL14™ Probiotics Blend - 75 Billion CFU (187.5mg)
A good probiotic formula is all about healthy bacteria. Probiotics support digestion, enhance the absorption of nutrients, and help prevent gastrointestinal problems. This branded ingredient is an exceptional blend that consists of: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Bifidobacterium breve, Lactobacillus fermentum, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Lactobacillus gasseri, Lactobacillus plantarum, Bifidobacterium lactis, Lactobacillus casei, Lactobacillus paracasei, Lactobacillus salivarius, Bifidobacterium longum, Bifidobacterium bifidum, Bifidobacterium infantis, and Streptococcus thermophilus.

Prebiotic Blend
Fructooligosaccharides (Nutraflora® FB P-95) - 400 mg - This ingredient provides at least 95% of pure short-chain fructose called fructooligosaccharides, also known as "FOS", a type of carbohydrate known as oligosaccharides. These chains are non-digestible prebiotic fibers that pass through the small intestine and support healthy bacteria in your digestive tract.(1)

Xylooligosaccharide (PreticX®) – 400mg - is a non-digestible xylooligosaccharide or "XOS" which has been clinically studied to help intestinal regularity and increase counts of bifidobacteria in the colon. This supports gut health and normal metabolism.(2)

Gut Health Blend
This powerful blend consists of three effective ingredients:

Ginger Root Extract – 50mg - This is a plant with an extended history in traditional medicines. The active ingredient is gingerol. It supports digestion, eases occasional stomach upset.(3)

Licorice Root Extract 4:1 – 50mg - Here’s an ingredient that’s one of the oldest remedies in the world. One of the most common uses of this plant is to ease an upset stomach.(4)

Peppermint Powder – 25mg - This popular ingredient has a long history of treating digestive ailments. These include indigestion, gas, and bloating. The combination of these three natural ingredients has a powerful synergistic effect on your digestive health.(5)

DIGESTIVE ENZYMES

This outstanding product is a full spectrum digestive enzyme complex. Digestive Enzymes features full disclosure labeling and exceptional dosing. This formula packs 7 blends including:

Dynamic Digestion Blend

Betaine Hydrochloride – 100mg - Betaine is known by many names. Betaine Anhydrous is currently popular as an effective power and strength ingredient. It’s similar to creatine and pulls water into the muscles the same way creatine does. Then there’s betaine hydrochloride. This form of betaine promotes normal protein digestion. It also promotes normal gastric pH and improves the absorption of several important minerals that include iron, calcium, and B12.(6)

Ox Bile – 100mg - The liver produces bile to assist in the breakdown of fats. It also supports the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, and K.

Protein Breakdown Blend
This powerful blend of four digestive enzymes optimizes protein digestion and we know protein is key for bodybuilders, powerlifters, and anyone else who trains hard. Let’s look at what makes up this impressive blend:

Protease (13,478 HUT) – 152mg - A group of enzymes whose sole function is to break down protein.(7)

Bromelain (360 GDU) – 150mg - Another group of enzymes that comes from the stem of pineapple fruit. Sometimes called pineapple enzyme, this ingredient helps the body digest protein.(8)

Pancreatin (1,625 USP) – 65mg - The primary function of this enzyme is to support the breakdown of food. This includes carbohydrates and fats, as well as protein.(9)

Papain (3.25 TU) – 65mg - Also known as papaya enzymes, this is another enzyme that breaks down protein into smaller particles to be used by the body.(10)

Carbohydrate Breakdown
Of course, there’s more to a hardcore diet than protein—we need quality carbohydrates and healthy fats. Slower-absorbing carbs should be your primary intake but we also need simple carbs for just before your workout. That means you need optimal digestion of those carbs.

Amylase (9,31 DU) – 108mg – A digestive enzyme that breaks down carbs for more efficient digestion and absorption.(11)

Fat Breakdown
Healthy fats have a variety of roles in the body. While you want to avoid some fats, you also want to consume healthy fats such as nuts, cheese, and fatty fish. You’ll want the most efficient digestion possible to get the maximum benefits from your intake of it.

Lipase (348 FIP) – 70mg - This enzyme improves the digestion of fat. Lipase breaks fats down into more water-soluble compounds to help the body use fats more efficiently.(8)

Fiber Breakdown
High-fiber foods are more filling to help keep you satiated longer. We’ve included an enzyme to help digest fiber.

Cellulase (130 CU) – 26mg - This enzyme is actually a complex carbohydrate. It helps break down the plant fiber we eat into polysaccharides. The body then uses this compound or expels it.(12)

Milk Sugar (Lactose) Breakdown
Many people love dairy products yet can’t digest lactose, the sugar commonly found in such foods as milk or yogurt. This causes many people to avoid dairy products altogether.

Lactase (174 ALU) – 43mg - This enzyme breaks down lactose into simpler compounds the body can digest.(13)

Digest Best Blend – 190mg
This blend of compounds works together to enhance digestion and relieve digestive issues. This blend includes Ginger Root, Turmeric Powder, Organic Apple Cider Vinegar, Cayenne Pepper Fruit Extract, and Artichoke Leaf Powder.

Good digestion is essential to getting the most out of your dietary plan and supplementation. Be sure to take Digestive Defender and maximize your hard work, today!

name: Egg White Crystals
description_html:
Check a typical container of protein powder. Now, take a good look at the label. If it’s like many of the protein powders on the market, it likely includes 100 calories per serving and far too much sugar. Why should you settle for sugar in your protein powder? Sure, maybe a gram or two, but more than that? No way. Also, did you check the fat grams and total carbs content? Perhaps you are curious about just how many of these popular powders also contain artificial ingredients. Some may even be guilty of amino spiking. These are just some reasons Rich was against using a typical protein powder.

Best sources of protein for supplementation

Start by getting some 5% Nutrition Egg White Crystals, a product sourced from REAL FOODS, just as Rich Piana mentioned. What is an egg white crystal? Egg White Crystals come from gently and slowly dehydrating eggs until only the crystalline whites remain. That’s it! There’s absolutely nothing else in this product.

You can use 5% Egg White Crystals the same way you would a regular egg and more! Because they're unflavored, you can add them to any meal to boost high-quality protein. If you want to cook with them, just add water! On the go? No problem. Just bring a funnel with a few scoops of egg white crystals along with your protein shake or smoothie. Since they’re unflavored, they can be mixed into almost anything.

Plus, there’s no refrigeration required. That means you can take a serving or two with you. That makes 5% Egg White Crystals perfect for your busy, on-the-go lifestyle.

How do 5% Egg White Crystals compare with whey or other protein powders?

For starters, egg whites and egg white crystals have a higher biological value protein than most other proteins, comparable to whey. That's to say the amount of protein available for humans to absorb from egg whites and egg white crystals is represented by a Biological Value (or "BV") of 100, while proteins sourced from whey around approximately 104. Egg white crystals also have a net protein utilization (NPU) rating of 100 and an overall protein efficiency ratio (or "PER") of 3.9, which is higher than many other protein sources, including whey.

Ingredient Breakdown

Egg White Crystals – 20g protein per serving

One serving contains zero sugar, zero fats, and only 1g of total carbohydrates. Even better, one serving or five mini-scoops are only 90 calories! 5% Egg White Crystals are made from actual egg whites. All the water has been gently evaporated from the egg whites during manufacturing.

This approach means they taste better than other types of egg protein, such as dried egg white powder. What about regular flavored egg protein? Now you’re talking more calories and more sugar. As you can see, Rich had it right. Real food is the best way to go.

Whether you use them by themselves as an omelet, add them to a recipe, or add them to your shake, you want the best quality, best-tasting egg whites possible. That’s exactly what you get with 5% Nutrition Egg White Crystals!

Get the benefits of real food protein with 5% Nutrition Egg White Crystals!

Power your routine with a clean, great-mixing fiber blend designed for everyday digestion support. Core Fiber combines four complementary fiber sources to help maintain gut health, support regularity, and promote comfortable fullness—so you can stay consistent with your nutrition goals.

Why it works

  • Supports healthy digestion and regular bowel movements
  • Nourishes beneficial gut bacteria (prebiotic support)
  • Helps promote feelings of fullness to support appetite control
  • Mixes smooth, tastes good, and fits easily into daily habits

What’s inside (per scoop)

  • Fibersol® (Soluble Corn Fiber) — 3,000 mg
    Well-studied prebiotic fiber that supports digestive health and satiety.
  • Fructooligosaccharides (FOS) — 2,500 mg 
    Prebiotic fibers found in fruits and vegetables that help feed good gut bacteria and support regularity.
  • Polydextrose — 2,500 mg
    Water-soluble fiber that helps slow digestion and support feelings of fullness.
  • Psyllium Husk — 1,000 mg
    A blend of soluble and insoluble fiber to support bowel regularity and overall digestive comfort.

How to Use Core Fiber

Mix 1 scoop in 8–12 oz of water, juice, or your favorite shake once daily. Start with ½ scoop to assess tolerance. Drink plenty of water throughout the day.

Who Should Use Core Fiber

Anyone looking to support gut health, stay regular, and add daily prebiotic fiber to their nutrition plan. Works well alongside a balanced diet and active lifestyle.

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

One scoop provides the following:

This patented ingredient is a prebiotic fiber that comes from non-GMO corn starch that supports healthy digestion, promotes optimal gut health, and promotes feelings of fullness. In addition, Fibersol is backed by more than 30 years of clinical research.(1)

An ingredient you may not be familiar with is “FOS,” otherwise known as fructooligosaccharides. It contains a mixture of various oligosaccharides that are found in vegetables, fruit, and grains. FOS has several benefits. These include functioning as a source of beneficial gut bacteria and helping to ease constipation. In addition, FOS helps improve the absorption of iron, magnesium, and calcium. Finally, FOS provides immune system support due to their gut health functions.(2)

Polydexrose is a water-soluble fiber that slows digestion, promotes fullness, and provides healthy gut bacteria. In addition, it may help nutrient absorption, specifically calcium and iron. Finally, polydextrose is believed to lower insulin response after typical meals.(3)

This ingredient comes from the Plantago ovata plant. It’s a source of insoluble and soluble fiber. It improves digestive health and may help lower “bad” cholesterol. In addition, it promotes fullness, and functions as a prebiotic. Finally, psyllium husk eases constipation by soaking up water in the gut which creates a gel that supports regular bowel movements.(4)

name: Fish Oil
description_html:
What can Fish Oil possibly do for me?

Let’s find out! Fish Oil comes from “oily” fish such as salmon, mackerel, tuna, herring, and anchovies. Fish Oil is important because it provides Omega-3 EFAs (essential fatty acids).

These fatty acids are deemed “essential” because the body does not produce them naturally. Yet they are critical for overall health. Therefore, we must get these essential fatty acids from our dietary choices and supplements.

Basic good health is one of the keys to your success in bodybuilding or your chosen sport. You need to be fundamentally healthy if you want maximum size and strength. Not to mention, Fish Oil has benefits that directly affect your workouts. That’s why there’s 5% Nutrition Core Fish Oil.

The Benefits of 5% Core Fish Oil

Faster Recovery

Muscle growth occurs when the body is given sufficient time to recover. The muscle rebuilding and recovery process starts after your hard training in the gym ends.

Fish Oil helps ease muscle soreness due to strenuous exercise. This can improve the body’s ability to recover after your workout. You’ll come back ready to train. Ultimately, that means you will achieve your mass and strength goals faster.(1,2)

Joint Support†

Let’s be real. Sore joints can be a common problem among bodybuilders, powerlifters, and athletes. The heavier the weights, the more that’s true. Fish Oil is a common ingredient in many joint health products, and for good reason. It helps ease sore joints. (1)

Cognitive Support†

Fish Oil is essential for maintaining normal brain function throughout your life. The cell membranes of brain cells have a high quantity of EPA and DHA, the two primary Omega-3s in Fish Oil. They aid the preservation of cell membrane health. Also, they support communication between brain cells. (3)

Heart Health 

Fish Oil is thought to support overall heart health. The FDA has stated that limited research suggests that consuming fish oil may lower the risk of coronary heart disease; however, this research is not conclusive.

PRODUCT INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Fish Oil – 2,500 mg
Provides a huge 1,490 mg of EPA and DHA per serving.

EPA (epioapentaenoic acid) – 860 mg
Both EPA and DHA are polyunsaturated fatty acids. In addition to the benefits for bodybuilders and athletes, they are essential for infant cognitive development.

DHA (docosahexaenoic acid) – 630 mg
Almost 60% of the brain consists of fat. About one-third of that fatty brain tissue is DHA, while DHA and EPA are structural components of your largest organ, skin, and retina.

Other Omega-3s – 200 mg
Other Omega-3 fatty acids include alpha-linolenic acid. These are the primary Omega-3 fatty acids.

The Most Powerful Insulin Mimicker Available!

Additionally, this coenzyme plays a role in the utilization of pentose in the hexose monophosphate shunt, which is an alternative glucose oxidation pathway.

It helps keep levels of blood sugar stable as well as drive carbs into your muscle cells, which also pulls in lots of water for insane muscle fullness, and it has the research to back it up.(2) We’re delivering a huge 1g dose per serving!

It plays a primary part in energy metabolism and is also well-known as a potent antioxidant.(7) This form attaches ALA to a sodium salt which makes it extremely soluble and much more bioavailable than regular ALA. 

Chromium 400 mcg – Chromium is an essential trace mineral that plays a key role in insulin metabolism, in fact, it is absolutely required for insulin to function properly.

Fenugreek 100 mg – Wait, isn't that usually an ingredient found in test boosters? Yes, however, Fenugreek has also been shown to help lower blood glucose levels, so it's a natural fit for Freak Show.(8)

There's No Comparison on the Market

No doubt you train brutally; you’re part of the 5% Nutrition family. Did you know that water alone may not be enough to keep you hydrated? You can rehydrate faster and anytime with Hydrate Sticks. Bring a couple in your gym or laptop bag, and you’re all set!

Rehydrate with 5% Nutrition Hydrate Sticks! Each stick gives you a full spectrum of critical electrolyte minerals, vitamins, and nutrients that promote hydration, combat fatigue, and allow you to perform at your best. Take them to work, school, the beach, and the gym! Stay hydrated and get the most out of your workout.

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Vitamin C – 90 mg
While not directly involved in hydration, vitamin C is an antioxidant and immune system booster. Vitamin C also supports healthy bones, cartilage, skin, and teeth.(1)

Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin) – 1.2 mg
In general, the water-soluble B vitamins help convert food into energy and help the body cope with stress. Regarding hydration, the B vitamins help the body derail fatigue caused by dehydration. Individually, B2 is involved in energy production and cellular function(2)

Vitamin B6 – 5 mg
Like B2, B6 helps the body fight fatigue caused by dehydration. As an individual vitamin, B6 supports cognitive function.(3)

Folate (Folic Acid) – 800 mcg
This is another B vitamin that helps offset dehydration-related fatigue.

Vitamin B12 – 100 mcg
Of all the B vitamins, B12 is the most associated with energy and combating stress. A must-have B for hydration.

Biotin – 30 mcg
Besides combatting fatigue, biotin is good for healthy hair and skin.

Pantothenic Acid – 5 mg
The final B vitamin in Hydrate Sticks. Like the other B’s, this one supports energy production and helps fight fatigue.

Calcium – 90 mg
An electrolyte mineral, the calcium in Hydrate Sticks is a blend of 3 forms: calcium carbonate, calcium citrate, and DimaCal® (dicalcium malate). The primary advantage of each of these forms is improved absorption.(4)

Magnesium (as Magnesium Bisglycinate, Magnesium Citrate) – 100 mg
Magnesium is also an electrolyte mineral. One of the most important functions for 5%ers is that magnesium supports muscular contraction. 5% Hydrate Sticks uses two forms that provide superior absorption over other forms. In addition, magnesium bis-glycinate is involved in protein metabolism.(5)

Chloride – 348 mg
An electrolyte mineral that also improves digestion and metabolism.(6)

Sodium – 200 mg
Of all the electrolyte minerals, sodium gets a bad rap. Many 5%ers do their best to avoid it altogether. Besides helping to balance fluid levels in the body, sodium is crucial for normal nerve transmission. While high sodium levels in the diet should be controlled, it’s a critical electrolyte. It’s also in perfect balance with the other electrolyte minerals in 5% Hydrate Sticks.(7)

Potassium – 500 mg
This electrolyte mineral is also important. It can help manage normal blood pressure and support cardiovascular and bone health.(8)

L-Taurine – 1,500 mg
Taurine is a sulfonic amino acid with an extensive list of benefits. First and most important, taurine supports hydration thanks to its osmotic properties. In other words, it pulls water into the muscles. That’s why it’s in so many pre-workouts - it promotes water-based pumps. Other benefits include cognitive enhancement, enhanced recovery, and improved nervous system health.(9,10,11,12)

Coconut Water Concentrate – 1,250 mg
Coconut water is a concentrated source of electrolyte minerals. That makes it an ideal ingredient for performance and recovery. Also, it may have antioxidant and heart health benefits.

Tart Cherry Extract 10:1 – 250 mg
Tart Cherry Extract is a good source of vitamins A, C, B, and K, as well as the electrolyte minerals potassium and magnesium. Tart Cherry Extract supports recovery, joint health, and immune system health.(13,14)

SAM-e – 100 mg
Also known as S-Adenosyl Methionine, this ingredient occurs naturally in the body. It’s made from the amino acid methionine, a precursor to other compounds, such as taurine, and the potent antioxidant glutathione. SAMe is commonly used to support joint function and cognitive health. It also helps combat fatigue.

Now, that’s how a hydration supplement should be formulated! Plus, Hydrate Sticks is a vegan-friendly, non-GMO, and dairy-free product. No matter your training routine, everyone can rehydrate like a legend with Hydrate Sticks!

name: Kill It RTD Pre-Workout (12 FL oz Bottle)
description_html:
Open a bottle of Kill It® Ready-to-Drink Pre-Workout, and you’ll kick things off with an intense 400mg of caffeine paired with a sleeve-stretching 10g dose of glycerin. You might know this ingredient by its other name, glycerol, and it’s great for achieving great water-based pumps. Next, you’ll find a hardcore dose of taurine at 2 grams, paired with 4g of pure citrulline that lends you a friendly pump now and for hours into your next workout.

The original 5% Nutrition pre-workout was the Kill It® Pre-Workout formula, which has remained a bedrock of pre-workouts featuring a balance of energy, focus, and muscle pumps. This all-new Ready-to-Drink formula will up the game, giving you an on-demand pre-workout with even more pumps than the original. Plus, it has an incredible taste that allows you to pound the 12 Fl oz serving at room temperature or frosty from the fridge.

If you’re heading to the gym to work out, you need a pre-workout to drive you through your training session. What could be easier or faster than opening a Kill It® Ready-to-Drink Pre-Workout bottle? Just imagine an ice-cold, delicious pre-workout powerhouse! By the time you’ve finished it and arrived at the gym, you’ll be ready to tear into those weights! Plus, with an ingredient lineup that would put any competitor to shame, you’ll be able to train longer and recover quicker.

Go ahead, and check out that ingredient breakdown. Notice that we’re using a completely transparent label. There’s nowhere to hide all 14 ingredients packed into this great formula, and you won’t find any proprietary blends here, either.

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

One bottle of Kill It® Ready-to-Drink Pre-Workout is equal to one serving (12 fl oz) and supplies the following:

Glycerine – 10,000 mg
This is also known as glycerol. This very popular ingredient is a sugar alcohol that functions as an osmolyte. It holds water and carries it into the muscle cells. Promoting water-based pumps works together with taurine, betaine, and the 2 nitric oxide boosters to create amazing pumps. It also promotes extreme hydration. This is a very serious dose, so you can imagine the pumps you’ll get from this ingredient. Especially combined with the other pump enhancers in this advanced formula!(1)

L-Citrulline – 4,000 mg
No doubt anyone reading this knows what citrulline does. This is a solid dose; even better, it’s pure citrulline. Some of those other brands dilute citrulline's nitric oxide-based pump benefits by using citrulline malate. Not us; you know we’re all about the pump!(2,3)

Beta-Alanine – 3,200 mg
This compound is well-known for its endurance characteristics and works indirectly to increase carnosine levels in the body. It’s carnosine that buffers lactic acid in the muscles, which in turn promotes greater muscle endurance.(4)

Taurine – 2,000 mg
You often see this in energy drinks and pre-workouts for their cognitive benefits. Taurine is also an osmolyte. As we have seen, this means it pulls water into your muscles for intense water-based pumps. Therefore, it works with citrulline, Nitrosigine®, Glycerine, and, as we’ll see, betaine for crazy pumps.(5)

Betaine – 1,000 mg
You may have heard that betaine is similar to creatine. One of the main things betaine does is function as an osmolyte, like taurine and Glycerine. Can you tell we were serious about pumps when we created Kill It® Ready-to-Drink Pre-Workout? Plus, betaine supports strength and power.(6)

Caffeine (Caffeine Anhydrous, Caffeine Citrate, Dicaffeine Malate) – 400 mg
Well, we all know the core function of caffeine, now, don’t we? With the pumps well covered by this formula, we had to give this formula a solid and balanced array of caffeine sources, including a slower-release version to help reduce the jitters and smooth out any caffeine crash.

Tripotassium Citrate Monohydrate – 196 mg
This is a source of potassium, the electrolyte mineral. It also acts as an emulsifying agent.(7)

L-Theanine – 100 mg
Here’s an ingredient that helps balance the harsh effects caffeine can cause. You’ll see this in most pre-workouts for that reason. It does this by acting as a relaxant, yet it does not cause drowsiness.(8)

Sodium – 100 mg
One of the primary functions of sodium is its role as an electrolyte. Besides hydration, sodium pulls water into the muscle cells, which promotes cell volume.

Potassium – 190 mg
Like sodium, potassium is an electrolyte mineral. The last thing you want when you work out is to be dehydrated. Good hydration is key to optimal performance.

Coconut Water Powder – 100 mg
A rich source of electrolyte minerals. Coconut Water Powder promotes and maintains hydration.

Sodium Citrate Dihydrate – 86 mg
This is a source of the electrolyte mineral sodium. It’s also commonly used to help improve the flavor by regulating tartness.(9)

Huperzia serrata Club Moss Extract – 10 mg
This ingredient helps increase focus, improve mood, and enhance memory.

After reading the label, one fact should be abundantly clear: 5% Nutrition is serious about dominating the Ready-to-Drink pre-workout market! Try a bottle or grab an entire case (12 bottles) one or both incredible flavors!

name: Knocked Out Sleep Aid
description_html:
No matter how hard you train or how well you eat, you won’t grow if you don’t recover. Recovery is one of the keys to muscle growth, and one of the keys to recovery is deep, restful sleep. If you consistently fail to get a good night’s sleep, you’ll experience the destructive effects of catabolic hormones such as cortisol. What are these negative effects? Two examples include muscle loss and possible fat gain.

Knocked Out by 5% Nutrition is the ultimate natural sleep aid! This product combines herbs, amino acids, and natural ingredients to create a formula that helps you relax and fall into a deep, restful sleep. We’re talking about a combination of ingredients like GABA, Melatonin, Chamomile, 5-HTP, and Tryptophan. So get some serious sleep and keep those gains coming!

GABA - 750 mg 

This is a non-protein amino acid that acts as an inhibitory neurotransmitter. This means that it helps to promote relaxation, which is critical to being able to fall asleep every night. Often used as a sleep aid, research indicates it also stimulates GH release.(1,2)

L-Tyrosine - 750 mg 

Tyrosine is a very popular cognitive enhancer that increases levels of the neurotransmitters noradrenaline and dopamine. Increased levels of these neurotransmitters improve mood and focus while relieving feelings of stress.(3)

Chamomile - 650 mg

Chamomile has a long history of use in traditional medicine, dating back 5,000 years, in helping to stimulate sleep. The relaxing effects of Chamomile may be due to naturally high levels of an antioxidant known as apigenin that attaches to specific receptors in the brain that help promote relaxation and stimulate sleep.(4)

Inositol - 500 mg

Also known as Vitamin B8, this ingredient promotes increased levels of serotonin, a brain neurotransmitter that can help you relax and fall asleep.(5)

Lemon Balm - 500 mg 

This herb has a long history as a relaxant that helps the body cope with stress.(6)

L-Tryptophan - 500 mg 

This essential amino acid has a long history of use as a sleep aid due to its ability to stimulate serotonin release in the brain. As stated above, serotonin is a brain neurotransmitter that helps the body relax and fall asleep.(7)

Passion Flower - 200 mg 

This is a flowering plant with a long history in traditional medicine to promote relaxation. It’s thought to work with GABA to help calm the mind.

Hibiscus Flower - 200 mg 

This herbal extract provides numerous immune and digestive benefits.

L-Phenylalanine - 75 mg 

Phenylalanine is an essential amino acid that’s a precursor of the amino acid Tyrosine, which as we have seen above, is an amino acid that combats stress while supporting focus.

L-Theanine - 75 mg 

This is an amino acid that’s thought to help combat stress and may support your ability to fall asleep. Additionally, it can support a state of non-drowsy relaxation, making it popular to help tone down the effects of Caffeine.(8)

5-HTP - 30 mg 

5-HTP is made in the body from Tryptophan and is converted into serotonin, which in turn can be converted into the hormone melatonin. Melatonin plays an important role in regulating sleep. Its levels begin to rise in the evening to promote sleep and fall in the morning to help wake you up.(9)

Melatonin - 8 mg 

Melatonin is a hormone that works with your body’s circadian rhythm, which is your body’s internal wake/sleep clock. It lets you know when it’s time to sleep and when it’s time to wake up. Levels of Melatonin begin to increase when it gets dark outside, telling your body it’s time to sleep.(10)

*Product name may vary between flavors.

name: L-Citrulline 3000
description_html:
Few things are as great as that feeling of looking in the mirror after a brutal workout and seeing your muscles swollen to their limits. And there is no better way to achieve this than taking proven pump ingredients before your workout.

L-Citrulline is the #1 go-to ingredient for muscle swelling pumps in the gym. L-Citrulline is converted to L-Arginine in the body to support L-Arginine and nitric oxide levels. Increased production of nitric oxide promotes vascular dilation which improves oxygen and blood circulation throughout the body. 

GlycerSize is an advanced form of glycerol that delivers more glycerol per gram than any other glycerol product on the market. GlycerSize supports improved hydration and nutrient absorption due to its ability to enhance the cell’s ability to absorb water. Think of your muscles as sponges, GlyerSize turns them ultra-absorbent encouraging them to soak up water and extra nutrients. This in turn improves performance, endurance, vascularity, fullness and pumps. 

Combined you get a powerful one, two punch to swell up your muscles for a massive pump.

name: L-Glutamine 5000
description_html:
Glutamine is one of the most widely used ingredients for post-workout recovery. 

The issue with most of the Glutamine products available is that they only contain regular L-Glutamine and nothing else. Plain L-Glutamine is decent for recovery, but it can be improved. Recently it was discovered that taking L-Alanine with L-Glutamine was superior to taking L-Glutamine alone (in isolated animal research models).

So when it came time to formulate our Glutamine product, we decided that a decent recovery was not enough and that we needed the best. This is why we included L-Alanine to offer a superior overall Glutamine supplement. Try this easily stackable and unflavored supplement today!
