name: Liquid L-Carnitine 3150
description_html:
Liquid L-Carnitine 3150 delivers a state-of-the-art liquid Carnitine formula that outclasses the competition. It begins with a huge dose of the four most effective forms of Carnitine. This formula is boosted with the addition of 25 mg of the innovative “Super Carnitine" known as Gamma-Butyrobetaine Ethyl Ester HCl or simply "GBB" for short--one of the most powerful Carnitine formulas available.

This outstanding formula promotes fat loss by converting stored fat into energy. It also stimulates thermogenesis and supports recovery and muscle growth. Liquid L-Carnitine 3150 from 5% Nutrition stands above the competition!

Thiamin – 25 mg
This is one of the water-soluble B-complex vitamins, also known as Vitamin B1. This vitamin helps the body use carbohydrates for energy, complementing the ATP-enhancing benefits of Carnitine.

Carnitine Blend – 3,150 mg
This is a monster dose of Carnitine. The competition can’t touch it! Of course, 5% Nutrition developed an advanced blend utilizing the four most effective forms of Carnitine. Each form has its benefits, yet they all help burn fat for energy. Plus, it’s tied with the advanced GBB, known as “Super Carnitine.”

L-Carnitine – This is usually referred to as an amino acid. Yet, technically, L-Carnitine is a molecule derived from two amino acids: methionine and lysine. It’s naturally produced in the liver and kidneys. L-carnitine is responsible for the transport of fatty acids to the mitochondria. This is where it’s burned for energy by the body.(3)

This conversion into energy by the mitochondria creates ATP. Of course, ATP is what your muscles use for energy when you’re working out. Plus, this process increases during intense exercise to meet your muscles’ demand for fuel.

Like some amino acids, L-carnitine is conditionally essential. That means not everyone can achieve sufficient levels through diet alone, so supplementation is advisable.

L-Carnitine L-Tartrate – Also known as LCLT, this form of Carnitine is absorbed faster than other forms. It also supports muscle growth and recovery.(4) The primary way LCLT influences muscle growth is by increasing the androgen receptor that allows testosterone to work more effectively in the body. This means lean muscle growth is stimulated and recovery is enhanced.(5)

Acetyl-L-Carnitine – Known as ALCAR, is a form of Carnitine with a wide range of benefits. These include cognitive benefits such as mood elevation and improved learning ability. Of course, it supports the use of stored fat for energy. As mentioned, this ultimately contributes to ATP production.(6)

Glycine Propionyl L-Carnitine – Also referred to as GPLC, it combines Propionyl-L-Carnitine (PLC) and the amino acid glycine. This form promotes nitric oxide production. Of course, this means pumps and improved nutrient delivery. Yes, it supports the use of fatty acids for energy.(7)

Gamma-Butyrobetaine (GBB) Ethyl Ester HCl – This is a newer ingredient commonly called a “Super Carnitine.'' GBB is the molecule your body converts into L-Carnitine to produce its own Carnitine. Some studies suggest that plasma carnitine concentrations double after taking GBB. This is how it got the nickname “Super Carnitine”. GBB also has thermogenic properties. That makes it effective for stimulating fat loss. Additionally, like GPLC, it also stimulates nitric oxide production.(8,9)

Adding the innovative GBB helps increase Carnitine concentrations in the body. Liquid L-Carnitine 3150 supplements are for anyone looking for fat loss, mood elevation, pumps, and lean muscle growth.

name: Liver & Organ Defender
description_html:
Healthy Heart, Liver, Prostate & Kidney

The bodybuilding lifestyle can be hard on the organs, such as the heart, liver, prostate gland and kidneys. What happens when you combine the demands of eating more food, aggressive supplement choices and the rapid gain in mass? It has a major impact on the body’s organs. Healthy skin can be challenging for bodybuilding competitors, and those of us not on a stage, when increased hormone levels wreak havoc on the skin.

This is where Liver & Organ Defender can support the gym-goer in all of us. We have created an effective well-dosed, formula with an uncompromising list of ingredients. This powerful product covers the fundamental health needs of bodybuilders and athletes, and the general public.

Heart Support

The importance of a healthy heart goes without saying. Let’s face it, your heart is largely responsible for keeping you alive. The heart pumps blood throughout the body and carries oxygen and nutrients.

Liver Support

The liver weighs just over 3 lbs. It’s roughly the size of a football. Also, it’s the largest vital organ in the body. It controls hundreds of chemical actions in the body. Compared to the average person, bodybuilders put great stress on their livers. This is because of their aggressive supplement use. It’s also due to a higher-than-normal protein intake. The liver still has to filter everything despite the increased stress. In response to this dilemma, Liver & Organ Defender promotes liver health and function. This impressive product has a comprehensive ingredient complex that surpasses the competition. 

Prostate Support

The prostate gland is part of the male reproductive system. It’s primarily responsible for helping to make semen. The main health concern associated with the prostate is enlargement. Therefore, it makes sense to do everything you can to keep your prostate healthy.

Kidney Support

The kidneys are one of the most important vital organs in the body. Their primary function is filtering waste products from the blood. The lifestyle habits of extreme bodybuilders put extra stress on your kidneys. Therefore, using Liver & Organ Defender for optimal kidney support makes sense.

Skin Support

Healthy skin looks good, and it’s a sign of good health. It goes without saying that a good complexion sets a strong visual example. This has the benefit of changing the stereotyped image of bodybuilding as an unhealthy lifestyle. In addition, elevated hormone levels play a key role in acne problems. This is an unpleasant skin condition at best. Liver & Organ Defender promotes healthy skin and decreases the problems associated with acne.

name: Post Gear PCT Support with Turkesterone
description_html:
Keep hard-earned gains with Post Gear® a PCT Support enhanced with Turkesterone

Post Gear® is a comprehensive PCT formula that covers every significant aspect of an effective post-cycle therapy program, including testosterone support, estrogen inhibitors, liver support, and cortisol regulation. That means you stay healthy and bring your hormones back into balance, allowing you to maintain your gains.

You don’t just train — you push your body past the limit. Post Gear® by 5% Nutrition was tailored for the 5%'ers who refuse to settle for average recovery. This is hardcore post-cycle support, designed to keep you moving forward when others fall off.

Why PCT Support Matters

How does a Post Cycle Therapy or "PCT" supplement help to keep those hard-earned gains? Helping to restore hormonal balance quickly helps bring your natural testosterone production back to normal levels while it combats excess estrogen, thereby blocking any estrogen-related side effects. Additionally, a well-formulated PCT should support your liver's overall function and inhibit cortisol levels, the destructive anti-catabolic hormone.

The Ultimate PCT Formula

Loaded with heavy-hitting ingredients like D-Aspartic Acid, Tribulus Terrestris, Stinging Nettle, and DIM, Post Gear helps support natural testosterone balance while keeping estrogen in check. Add in Milk Thistle and liver-supporting compounds, and you’ve got a formula that’s as serious about protecting your body as you are about punishing the weights.

  • Hardcore support for serious athletes*

  • Formulated to promote hormonal balance and recovery*

  • Organ and liver support so you can keep grinding*

  • A true 5% formula — no shortcuts, no compromises

Post Gear® isn’t for the casual crowd. It’s for the ones who live the 5% lifestyle — all in, every day, every rep. When the work’s done in the gym, Post Gear® has your back so you can hit it harder tomorrow.

Ingredients That Work for You

Vitamin D – 125 mcg – has been shown in recent years to have several significant benefits, including the ability to support increased testosterone production.(1)

Zinc 30 mg, Magnesium 70 mg, Vitamin B6 10.5 mg – the combination of these ingredients is more commonly referred to as ZMA and has been shown to promote increases in testosterone. The primary study that backs this up was conducted in 2000 using NCAA football players as test subjects. In this 7-week-long study, researchers gave ZMA supplements to test subjects working out twice daily. At the end of the study, researchers found a significant increase in the test subjects' testosterone levels.

Testosterone Boosting Complex

D-Aspartic Acid – 3,120 mg – This proven natural testosterone booster will quickly get your test levels back on track by using the full clinical dose for optimal results. DAA is one of the most effective natural test boosters available, with clinical research backing its effectiveness. One study shows an increase in natural test levels by 40% in just 12 days, which is precisely what you need when you're getting your hormones back to normal.(2)

Longjack Extract – 300 mg – Research Research shows that Longjack is an adaptogen that helps the body deal with general day-to-day stress. Longjack helps balance the cortisol-to-testosterone ratio essential to maintaining an anabolic environment post-cycle.(3) Longjack works synergistically with many other ingredients in Post Gear®, such as DAA, Zinc, Magnesium, and Vitamin D, to get your test levels back to full speed.

Ajuga Turkestanica Extract – 200 mg – Turkesterone has quickly become one of the most popular natural muscle builders. That’s because it works! No wonder we added it to Post Gear - we wanted the most potent formula possible. Now that we’ve added the power of the ingredient Turkesterone, we have just that! Turkesterone stimulates protein synthesis, which is essential following a serious supplement cycle. Why? Because post-cycle, your gains come to a halt. One of the best things you can do is stimulate gains through protein synthesis. Turkesterone also supports increased strength; if that’s not enough, it also has anti-catabolic benefits.(4,5,6)

Estrogen Control Complex

Brassaiopsis Glomerulata – 500 mg – This innovative ingredient is a tree native to Vietnam with a long history of traditional use. It contains several aromatase inhibitors that show good estrogen-inhibition potential.(7)

DIM – 300 mg – Also known as Diindolylmethane, this ingredient is one of the components that make up Indole-3-Carbinol and originates in such vegetables as broccoli, kale, and cauliflower.

It is a regulator of estrogen metabolism that helps keep estrogen levels in balance. It does this by preventing the conversion of testosterone into estrogen.(8) DIM works synergistically with Brassaiopsis Glomerulata to keep the estrogen under control.

Stinging Nettle – 300 mg – Also known as Urtica Dioica, this plant has a long history of traditional use. Stinging Nettle contains the active ingredient 3,4-Divanillyltetrahydrofuran, a lignan suggested to increase levels of free, or usable, testosterone, which is the amount of testosterone the body allows to be used for muscle growth.(9)

Acacetin – 50 mg – This ingredient originates from Damiana and is thought to inhibit aromatase, an essential part of estrogen synthesis. Acacetin works synergistically with Brassaiopsis and DIM to keep estrogen levels under control.

Liver Support Complex

Milk Thistle Extract – 200 mg – One of the most popular herbs on the market, this herb supports liver health. Milk Thistle has been used for centuries as a general tonic for overall liver function.

Artichoke Leaf Extract – 50 mg – Artichoke has a wide range of benefits. We've included it in Post Gear® to work synergistically with Milk Thistle to support normal liver health and function.

Absorption

AstraGin® – 25 mg – This 100% plant-based ingredient consists of Astragalus membranaceus and Panax Notoginseng. This impressive patented ingredient increases the absorption of the nutrients in Post Gear. Absorption is everything, right?(10)

name: Probio-75
description_html:
Do you want to achieve the goals you’re working hard for? No doubt you’re eating a carefully calculated balance of protein, carbohydrates, and fats to optimize your macronutrients while training. In order to maximize the benefits of your diet, supplements, and training you'll have to improve your digestion. This is a powerful probiotic and prebiotic formula. A probiotic is a living organism that helps restore healthy bacteria in the gut. A prebiotic supports growth of healthy bacteria. Combined, these compounds dramatically improve gut health.

PRODUCT BREAKDOWN

SL14™ Probiotics Blend - 75 Billion CFU (187.5mg)
A good probiotic formula is all about healthy bacteria. Probiotics support digestion, enhance the absorption of nutrients, and help prevent gastrointestinal problems. This branded ingredient is an exceptional blend that consists of: Lactobacillus acidophilus, Bifidobacterium breve, Lactobacillus fermentum, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Lactobacillus gasseri, Lactobacillus plantarum, Bifidobacterium lactis, Lactobacillus casei, Lactobacillus paracasei, Lactobacillus salivarius, Bifidobacterium longum, Bifidobacterium bifidum, Bifidobacterium infantis, and Streptococcus thermophilus.

Prebiotic Blend
Fructooligosaccharides (Nutraflora® FB P-95) - 400 mg - This ingredient provides at least 95% of pure short-chain fructose called fructooligosaccharides, also known as "FOS", a type of carbohydrate known as oligosaccharides. These chains are non-digestible prebiotic fibers that pass through the small intestine and support healthy bacteria in your digestive tract.(1)

Xylooligosaccharide (PreticX®) – 400mg - is a non-digestible xylooligosaccharide or "XOS" which has been clinically studied to help intestinal regularity and increase counts of bifidobacteria in the colon. This supports gut health and normal metabolism.(2)

Gut Health Blend
This powerful blend consists of three effective ingredients:

Ginger Root Extract – 50mg - This plant has an extended history in traditional medicines. The active ingredient is gingerol. It supports digestion and eases occasional stomach upset.(3)

Licorice Root Extract 4:1 – 50mg - Here’s an ingredient that’s one of the oldest remedies in the world. One of the most common uses of this plant is to ease an upset stomach.(4)

Peppermint Powder – 25mg - This popular ingredient has a long history of treating digestive ailments. These include indigestion, gas, and bloating. The combination of these three natural ingredients has a powerful synergistic effect on your digestive health.(5)

Good digestion is essential to getting the most out of your dietary plan and supplementation. Be sure to take PROBIO-75® and maximize your hard work, today!

name: Pump Caps with S7®
description_html:
PUMP CAPS

It's the holy grail lifters strive to achieve during a workout. Most 5%ers know that the body naturally produces nitric oxide as a vasodilator. This means it causes the blood vessels to relax, increasing blood flow and leading to the fabled pump. What 5%er doesn’t want massive pumps, right? As a bonus, the increased blood flow enhances nutrient and oxygen delivery to the working muscles.

Enter 5% Core Pump! Our powerful pump formula features S7®, a patented and very effective 7-ingredient blend. This plant-based blend ignites the body’s natural production of nitric oxide and lowers free radicals that can reduce nitric oxide levels. Many of the compounds in the S7® blend have potent antioxidant properties.

Most companies dose S7® at the clinical research dose of 50 mg but that's where 5% Nutrition is different! We've increased that dose to a mind-blowing 200 mg per serving! Now, that’s a dose that would make Rich smile! We didn’t stop there, adding Dan Shen Extract to enhance the effectiveness of this product even more. With this dose, you only need one 5% Core Pump capsule daily while stacking it with any 5% Nutrition pre-workout. It’s a must-have pump powerhouse!

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

S7® – 200 mg

S7® is a patented stim-free blend of seven plant-based ingredients: Green Coffee Bean Extract, Green Tea Extract, Turmeric, Tart Cherry, Blueberry, Broccoli, And Kale. The typical dose is 50 mg, but 5% take it to the extreme with a mind-blowing 200 mg dose! How's that for effective dosing?

What is the effect of S7®? It promotes huge pumps by increasing the body’s natural nitric oxide production. One of the ways it does this is by combatting excessive free radicals. This helps prevent nitric oxide degradation. The other way S7® works is by increasing the body’s own production of nitric oxide. This dual pathway approach helps optimize nitric oxide levels in the body.(1)

Dan Shen Extract – 150 mg

Also known as Red Sage, Dan Shen has an extended history of use in Chinese medicine to improve circulation. This means it increases blood flow, resulting in even greater pumps.(2)

5% Core Pump will promote the kind of pumps that would make Rich proud! Leave it to 5% Nutrition to give you an above-average dose of the main ingredient and an efficacious amount of the supporting ingredients.

name: Pump Shot Nitric Oxide Booster
description_html:
You've probably heard about glycerol by now, especially if you're chasing those insane Rich Piana-sized pumps. Pump Shot® can do more than sleeve stretching pumps, including hyper-hydration, enhanced endurance, greater strength, and improved performance.*

Skip the hype of other liquid glycerol products and go right for the top shelf with Pump Shot® Nitric Oxide Booster! This innovative single-serving 2 oz shot delivers a massive 20g dose of glycerol (that's 20,000 milligrams of glycerol!) per serving! We've paired that with another champion pump producer, the well-researched pump agent, S7®. This combination of pump-based ingredients not only supports insane pumps but activates hyper-hydration, extended endurance, improved performance, and recovery.*

This product was formulated for maximum pumps and, with the right training program, ultimate gains. It features clinically researched ingredients on a transparent label. When it's time to hit the gym, down a Pump Shot® and get ready for exceptional pumps, outrageous endurance, and hyper-hydration.*

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Glycerol – 20 Grams
You’ve seen that the 5% Nutrition Pump Shot® features an insane 20 grams of glycerol. If you haven’t heard about this amazing compound, 5% has you covered. Glycerol (interchangeably called glycine or glycerin) is a sugar alcohol that’s a byproduct of glucose and fatty acid metabolism. Plus, it’s necessary for gluconeogenesis, which is how your liver synthesizes glucose from non-sugar substrates such as protein. The glycerol used in supplements like Pump Shot® comes primarily from vegetable oil. The primary function of glycerol is as an osmolyte. It dramatically increases the total water volume in your body and includes your muscles.(1,2)

Now, if you consume glycerol with lots of water, your body and muscles will retain that fluid. This means insane muscle cell volume or water-based pumps. Get ready because the pumps are mind-boggling! But that’s not all. Glycerol hyper-hydrates your body. That pays you big-time dividends in improved endurance, strength, and performance. So much so you should expect seriously improved workouts.

S7® – 50 mg
S7® is a patented blend of the following 7 natural ingredients - green coffee bean extract, green tea extract, turmeric, tart cherry, blueberry, broccoli, and kale. One thing that sets S7® apart from other popular ingredients is that a 50 mg dose is all you need. S7® works by increasing your body’s production of nitric oxide. It also works synergistically with other nitric oxide boosters to increase production. Nitric oxide acts as a vasodilator. That means it causes blood vessels to relax. This increases blood flow, thereby increasing the pump. Plus, more blood flow means nutrients and oxygen are delivered to your working muscles faster.(3)

If you want outrageous mind-blowing water-based and N.O. pumps, there’s only one choice – Pump Shot®!

name: Real Carbs + Protein
description_html:
When it came to protein powders Rich Piana was adamant about one thing – he didn’t like them. Rich downright hated everything about them!

Instead, he believed in the idea of whole food complete meals and that kind of thinking guided him in his quest to create exceptional supplements that offered more.

When the time came for 5% to create a premium product, high in available protein, we knew that we had to stay true to his primary beliefs. Anything that 5% Nutrition created had to be a complete whole food meal. 

We didn’t merely create a protein powder or just another meal replacement powder – that would have been too easy. We did it the 5% way by creating a complete whole food meal, Real Carbs + Protein®! We’re talking about 20 grams of whole food proteins combined with 30 grams of whole food carbohydrates. The perfect bodybuilding meal. Talk about the ultimate meal replacement!

A true bodybuilding protein blend must be able to keep you in an anabolic environment to support lean muscle growth, and that’s exactly what we did with Real Carbs + Protein®.(1) Protein has been sourced from an innovative complex: Beef Protein Isolate, Whole Egg Powder, Chickpea Protein, and Organic Chicken Powder. This combination creates a protein blend with variable digestion speeds that’s extremely high in quality, purity, nitrogen retention, and bioavailability.

5% Nutrition Protein Blend – 20 Grams

Beef Protein Isolate – This is a whole food protein created by using a special infusion process that preserves all the key amino acids, peptides, nucleotide fractions, vitamins, and minerals that are naturally found in beef. Beef isolate digests slower than whey and has a BV (Biological Value) score that’s comparable to whey. It’s 97% protein with a high BCAA content and low fat, cholesterol, and sodium content. Beef isolate promotes the ideal anabolic environment for your muscles so you can experience the results you’ve been training for.

Whole Egg Powder – Eggs are a premium quality protein source with a medium digestion speed and an excellent bioavailability score of 100, making them an ideal addition to Real Carbs + Protein®. We use Whole Egg Powder that’s sourced from real, whole eggs.

Chickpea Protein – This is an excellent source of protein with a medium-fast digestion speed that’s high in fiber, vitamins, and minerals.(2)

Organic Chicken Powder – This is a high-quality slow-digesting protein source that’s also high in important B vitamins as well as minerals such as selenium.

This unique complex of whole food proteins creates a sustained anabolic response which is exactly what you want from a whole food meal. Taken after a workout, at the start of your day, or anytime during the day, Real Carbs + Protein® will keep you in an anabolic state for hours which is exactly what you want if you want to keep those gains coming or preserve your hard-earned muscle if you’re cutting.

Total Carbohydrates – 30 Grams

The carbohydrate source in Real Carbs + Protein® comes from:

Whole Grain Oats – A low glycemic, low sugar carbohydrate that will avoid insulin spikes yet provide the carbs your body needs for glycogen replenishment and muscular energy. Oats are a bodybuilding mainstay and fit in well with the proteins in Real Carbs + Protein®.(3)

Sweet Potato – Sweet potatoes are a staple in the diets of many bodybuilders due to their nutrient profile, delicious flavor, and the fact that they are considered a low glycemic carbohydrate. Sweet Potatoes taste delicious and contain high amounts of calcium, potassium, phosphorus, B Vitamins, Vitamin A, as well as Vitamin C.(4)

Rice – Rice is another cornerstone carbohydrate source for many bodybuilders. Usually, it’s brown rice because brown rice is nutritionally complete and is a low glycemic carb.(5)

We can confidently say that Rich would be proud of Real Carbs + Protein® because he believed, above all else, that real whole food was the principal element for bodybuilding success! With an innovative source of whole food proteins, paired with the right carbohydrates, we have created a unique meal replacement product for the market.

name: Real Carbs Complex Carbohydrates
description_html:
As great as an arsenal of quality supplements can be, there’s nothing like real whole-food meals. Rich Piana believed that you should be eating several high-quality whole-food meals a day if you want to make maximum progress.

However, we understand that prepping 3 to 4 meals a day doesn’t always work for many people. Many people lead very active lifestyles and just don’t have enough time to prep or eat enough quality real-food meals. Real Carbs® is an innovative whole-food-based product designed to help you get the nutrition you need to grow easily and quickly.

Real Carbs® is a complex carbohydrate powder that consists of Sweet Potatoes, Oats, Yams, and Blueberry Fruit Powder. This combination is primarily low glycemic and provides 22 grams of carbs per serving with just 2 grams of sugar. Real Carbs® has several delicious flavors, including Sweet Potato Pie, Blueberry Cobbler, Strawberry Shortcake, and Banana Nut Bread. Enjoy it several times daily as a meal, pre-workout carb loading, or a recovery drink for post-workout. Made even more effective if combined with a protein sourced from real whole foods.

Total Carbohydrates – 22 Grams (per serving)

Sweet Potato

Sweet potatoes are a mainstay in the diets of many bodybuilders and athletes due to their nutrient profile, delicious flavor, and the fact that they are considered a low glycemic carbohydrate. Sweet Potatoes originate in the Americas and contain high amounts of calcium, potassium, phosphorus, B vitamins, vitamin A, and vitamin C.(1) Additionally, they provide fiber and add sweetness to the flavor.

Oats

This is regular rolled oats which is another mainstay in the diets of many bodybuilders and athletes. Oats are low glycemic carbohydrates that are also high in important minerals and fiber. The combination of these three carbohydrate sources creates an outstanding real food Carbohydrate Powder that sets a new standard in the industry.

Wild Yam

Often confused with Sweet Potatoes, they are not the same thing. While both are tuberous vegetables, Yams are not quite as nutrient-dense or as sweet. They provide good sources of minerals such as potassium, phosphorous, and magnesium as well as vitamin C and are another low glycemic carbohydrate found in the diets of many bodybuilders and athletes.(2)

Blueberry Fruit Powder

Blueberries add to the overall flavor of Real Carbs® but are one of the most nutritious fruits available.(3) They are high in manganese, vitamin K, vitamin C, and fiber as well as an extremely rich source of antioxidants. The cognitive and cardiovascular health benefits of Blueberries are largely attributed to a type of antioxidant known as flavonoids, specifically, a flavonoid group called anthocyanins.(4) The use of real food in Real Carbs® supplies exceptional health benefits you won’t find in other types of carb powders and illustrates one of the primary reasons Rich Piana was adamant about getting in several whole food meals throughout the day.

The Flavors

You can’t really talk about Real Carbs® without talking about the amazing flavors, especially since there are two brand-new flavor options. Now there’s Strawberry Shortcake and Banana Nut Bread along with original flavors Sweet Potato Pie as well as Blueberry Cobbler. Talk about delicious!

name: Real Carbs Rice Complex Carbohydrates
description_html:
Supplements are great. Used correctly, they can make a big contribution to your progress. However, whole food will always come first. Before you worry about supplements, you should make sure you’re eating several quality real food meals every day. This was one of the things Rich continually preached. 

Having said that, we understand that making 3-4 meals a day may not work for everyone. If you lead a busy lifestyle, you may find it impossible to make more than a couple of meals a day. Real Carbs Rice Legendary Series is an advanced whole food powdered Carbohydrate supplement created to help you meet your nutritional needs. After all, one of the keys to growth is eating enough calories, right? If you can’t make all your meals, you’ll fall short of your macronutrient goals. Bottom line, you won’t grow. Not to mention, if you’re an endurance athlete, you need a quick and easy source of carbs. A Carbohydrate Powder is the ideal solution, and Real Carbs® Rice Legendary Series is the best on the market. 

Real Carbs® Rice Legendary Series is chocolate flavored. Did we say chocolate? Yes, we did, and it’s delicious! 

This amazing product contains Rice Bran and real Oats. This is a low glycemic carb complex that supplies 21 grams of total carbs per serving. There’s also 2 grams of sugar and 7 grams of fiber. Real Carbs® Rice Legendary Series can be used throughout the day. Use it by itself or mix it with Shake Time. It’s an anytime of the day meal. It’s also great as part of a pre or post workout shake.


Total Carbohydrates – 21 Grams per serving

Rice Bran

Rice has been a bodybuilding staple for generations. It’s nutritionally complete. It’s also typically brown rice because that version’s low glycemic.(1)

What is low glycemic? That refers to the Glycemic Index. The Index is a numerical value assigned to carbohydrate foods. It’s based on how fast or slow these foods increase levels of blood glucose. Glucose has a baseline value of 100. The longer it takes a carbohydrate food to digest, the lower the number. A low number means the carb food digests slowly and does not cause a rise in blood sugar.

Rice Bran is derived from outer bran layers and germ of brown rice. This is the most nutritious part of the rice.

Oats

This is simply regular rolled oats, just like your morning bowl of oatmeal. Of course, oats are a bodybuilding staple. They are low glycemic, and high in fiber as well as minerals.

These three sources of carbohydrates create an advanced whole food Carbohydrate Powdered supplement that redefines the Carbohydrate Powder category.

The Cocoa Heaven Flavoring

Finally, it’s time to talk about the taste. Why is it coca flavored? Simple. Rich absolutely loved Cocoa Crispy cereal. We’re talking obsessed with it! Therefore, the 5% Nutrition team wanted to create a Carbohydrate Powder that was capable of recreating that delicious Cocoa Krispy flavor. Guess what? We succeeded! If you like Cocoa Crispy Cereal as much as Rich did, one sip of Real Carbs® Rice Legendary Series and you’ll agree – it’s amazing!

It’s clear, Real Carbs® Rice Legendary Series is a cut above every other Carbohydrate Powder available. We use only whole food sources. Not to mention we created an amazing Cocoa Heaven flavor. Sounds delicious, doesn’t it? There’s no reason to wait, order yours today!

name: Reloaded Pre-Workout
description_html:
The Ultimate Pre-Workout!

Introducing Reloaded, the next evolution in 5% Nutrition pre-workouts. A popular member of our lineup, Reloaded has now been enhanced to be more hardcore than ever, setting it apart from the rest.

Reloaded offers a unique flexibility with its 1 or 2-scoop servings. At one scoop, it's a great choice for those who prefer a little less Caffeine. But at two scoops, it transforms into one of the most hardcore pre-workouts available, catering to a wide range of fitness needs.

Check out the formula - Reloaded is a pre-workout that stands above the crowd with an exceptional list of ingredients. 5% Nutrition has always been one of the few companies that feature Creatine Monohydrate in our pre-workouts. Now, we've gone a step further and created an exclusive Creatine Blend that features Creatine Monohydrate and 2 other forms of Creatine.

What about Caffeine? We thought you'd never ask! Now, there are 3 sources supplying 360 mg of Caffeine (at two scoops). And there's also a whopping 8 grams (at 2 scoops) of pure L-Citrulline for serious pumps.

Reloaded is an outstanding pre-workout featuring an advanced combination of energy, pump, focus, endurance, and performance ingredients. The ingredient profile is designed to create a complete, balanced pre-workout. Reloaded has it all, and of course, it tastes incredible, too!

Pump Blend

L-Citrulline – 4,000 mg / 8,000 mg
L-Citrulline is a non-essential amino acid that, once digested, converts into l-arginine. That's key because arginine is the compound used by the body to stimulate nitric oxide (NO) production. Of course, that means Citrulline promotes huge pumps! The thing is, Citrulline absorbs much better than arginine. That's because Citrulline bypasses digestion and instead goes right into the bloodstream. The result is that it does a better job of increasing arginine levels in the blood than arginine itself. (1,2)

HydroPrime® Glycerol Powder – 1,000 mg / 2,000 mg
Glycerol is a newer ingredient that has taken the supplement market by storm. That is no surprise since it's a powerful osmolyte that hyper-hydrates the muscles, promotes massive water-based pumps, and supports extended endurance. In Reloaded, it works synergistically with Creatine and Taurine. As expected, 5% does not use a generic version; we're using HydroPrime®, a state-of-the-art branded version. (3)

Inositol-Stabilized Arginine Silicate (Nitrosigine®) – 500 mg / 1,000 mg
This is a patented complex consisting of arginine, potassium silicate, and inositol that promotes nitric oxide production. It's fast-acting and typically goes to work within 30 minutes of ingestion. Plus, it can extend the pump for up to 6 hours – no wonder Reloaded gives lifters muscle-stretching pumps. (4)

Power Blend

Beta-Alanine – 1,000 mg / 2,000 mg
Beta-alanine is a non-proteinogenic amino acid, which means it is not involved in creating protein. It combines with the amino acid histidine to form carnosine, a dipeptide. Beta-alanine blocks the buildup of lactic acid indirectly by increasing levels of carnosine. This supports greater training endurance. However, Beta-alanine causes a harmless, temporary tingling and itching sensation that some lifters do not like. For this reason, we used a smaller but still effective dose. This gives lifters fewer tingles while blocking acid buildup and promoting extended endurance. (5)

L-Taurine – 1,000 mg / 2,000 mg
Technically speaking, Taurine is a non-proteinogenic amino-sulfonic acid. Whew, that's a mouthful, right? That means it has a different structure than typical amino acids and, like Beta-alanine, is not a protein "building block." So what does it do? Among other benefits, Taurine enhances cognitive function and acts as an osmolyte. That means it pulls water into the muscle cells, which increases muscle cell volume (water-based pumps).

L-Ornithine Hydrochloride – 200 mg / 400 mg
L-ornithine is an amino acid that is used in the urea cycle. Its job is to remove excess ammonia from the body. It's non-essential, meaning the body can make it. In fact, the liver cells produce L-Ornithine from the amino acid arginine. As you might recall from learning about L-Citrulline, arginine promotes nitric oxide production. This means bigger pumps! Arginine also supports the body's natural production of Creatine. In addition, it can help reduce fatigue levels by eliminating excess ammonia, supporting improved endurance. Finally, it may also stimulate growth hormone production, leading to gains in size and strength.(6)

Creatine Blend

Creatine Monohydrate – 2,250 mg / 4,500 mg
Reloaded is one of a few pre-workouts that contain Creatine. That demonstrates the innovation of 5% Nutrition, unlike those other companies that don't see the benefit of Creatine in a pre-workout. They don't include it in their pre-workout when the reality is that Creatine is one of the most effective ingredients lifters can use. It's the original cell volumizer, which means water-based pumps. Plus, among many other benefits, it extends endurance and improves strength.(7)

Creatine Citrate – 125 mg / 250 mg
This combines regular Creatine Monohydrate and Citric Acid, part of the Krebs Cycle. The body uses that energy system to convert food into ATP, the muscles' energy source. This combination supports greater endurance from ATP production.(8)

Creatine Pyruvate – 125 mg / 250 mg
This ingredient combines Creatine and Pyruvate, a blend that supports endurance, power, and exercise velocity. This combination also helps lower fatigue.(9)

Nootropic Blend

Choline Bitartrate – 500 mg / 1,000 mg
This is one of the more popular forms of Choline, and it's used in quite a few pre-workout and nootropic formulas. Choline is often included as part of the B vitamin family. It's a precursor to acetylcholine, known as the "learning neurotransmitter." Additionally, it's known as a focus enhancer.(10)

Organic Lion’s Mane Extract – 300 mg / 600 mg
This is a medicinal mushroom used in traditional Chinese medicine. It supports cognitive enhancement and has neuroprotectant properties. It may also enhance motivation and memory.

Alpha Glyceryl Phosphoryl Choline 50% – 100 mg / 200 mg
Alpha-glyceryl phosphoryl Choline (also known as Alpha GPC) is a type of fat that contains high amounts of Choline. This form of Choline helps maintain cell membranes and makes acetylcholine. It also has a major role in regulating brain function and muscle control.(11)

Toothed Clubmoss (Huperzia serrata) (1% Huperzine A) – 200 mcg / 400 mcg
Huperzine A elevates focus and indirectly increases acetylcholine levels. This means it works synergistically with Alpha GPC and Choline Bitartrate to improve cognitive function.(12)

Caffeine Blend

Caffeine Anhydrous – 150 mg / 300 mg
Caffeine is a very effective stimulant. Caffeine Anhydrous is Caffeine with the moisture removed. This results in a fast-acting, concentrated Caffeine powder.

Caffeine Citrate (50% Caffeine) – 25 mg / 50 mg 
This version of Caffeine is also fast-acting. 50% of the total dose is Caffeine. It’s combined with citrate to enhance absorption.

Dicaffeine Malate (Infinergy™) – 25 mg / 50 mg 
This is a branded form of Caffeine that is combined with malic acid. This slower-release Caffeine helps tame the quick off-the-line kick of the other forms of Caffeine in this outstanding formula. At 1 scoop, Reloaded provides a respectable 180 mg dose of total Caffeine. It gets hardcore quick with a stronger 360 mg dose if you use 2 scoops.

That's the new Reloaded Pre-Workout formula—we think it's sensational!

description_html:
POST-WORKOUT PROTEIN

Shake Time® is a protein powder designed to live up to the high standards of the Man himself, Rich Piana. Use it post-workout, first thing in the morning, or anytime you need protein. Make no mistake, this isn’t just another protein powder. This is a unique, real-foods-based, Rich Piana-style protein powder. Rich Piana was not the type of guy who bought into the protein powder craze. He believed that your protein sources should come from real foods, first and foremost. However, being realistic, he also understood that you can’t always afford the time or energy in your busy day for a proper sit-down meal.

Sometimes, the solution to achieve your protein count can only come in the form of a protein shake. This is especially true if you're up early and want to enjoy a fast-digesting source of protein before hitting the gym, or you need a quick source of protein between the gym and your way home. Leave it to Rich Piana's 5% Nutrition to formulate a protein shake that even the legend himself, Rich Piana, would endorse.

INGREDIENT BREAKDOWN

Shake Time can flip the anabolic switch and get you where you need to be. Adding a protein powder to your supplement arsenal is a no-brainer. Shake Time will stimulate protein synthesis and keep you anabolic if you’re training for size. If you're getting ready for your next contest, it will preserve your hard-earned muscle.

Beef Protein Isolate is a real food protein that contains zero carbs or fats. It’s a complete, ultra-pure protein made using an exclusive infusion process. This technology protects the critically important amino acids, peptides, nucleotide fractions, vitamins, and minerals naturally present in beef. Beef Protein Isolate is a fast-digesting protein but digests more slowly than whey. It's 97% protein and has a BV (Biological Value) comparable to whey. It doesn't stop there. Beef Protein Isolate also has a high BCAA content, which drives muscle growth. Beef Protein Isolate is a great choice for bodybuilders because it stimulates the ideal anabolic environment your muscles need to be in if you want the kind of results you’ve been training for.

This is a high-quality slow-digesting complete protein source that's high in B vitamins, selenium, and free of common allergens.

For decades, eggs have been one of the premier sources of protein for bodybuilders and powerlifters. They are a premium quality source of protein that digests slower than whey or beef but faster than casein proteins. The slowed speed of digestion means you stay in an anabolic state for longer. Shake Time uses Egg White Protein Powder sourced from real eggs!

This is a source of fat that digests fast enough to be used by the body as energy.

Proteins from real food that support recovery and stimulate an anabolic state

These are the results you should expect from a protein powder. This isn’t the 1990s; not everything has to be cheaply sourced, easy-to-flavor whey protein. Up your game with animal-sourced proteins. Enjoy Shake Time after a workout, or start your day with a protein shake to activate and extend an anabolic environment. Post-workout and first thing in the morning are both times when muscles could be in a catabolic state.

You’ve seen the quality of Shake Time as a shake protein. What about the taste? There are two delicious flavors: Vanilla Cinnamon and Chocolate. name: Stage Ready Diuretic
description_html:
THE MOST POWERFUL DIURETIC ON THE MARKET!

When Rich Piana won the 1998 Mr. California, it was the result of years of relentless training and dieting. Yet Rich knew the week leading up to contest day would determine where he would ultimately place. Rich understood the importance of shedding excess water weight before a competition. To do this, he would use a special combination of Dandelion Root, Shavegrass, and Uva Ursi Extract. These powerful ingredients were the key to making sure Rich was ripped to the bone and ready to storm the stage.

When we set out to create the kind of hardcore diuretic Rich would be proud of, we took a good look at all the possible ingredient options. Of course, we only chose the most effective and safest ingredients available. Included in this powerful formula is 600mg of Dandelion Extract, 550mg of Shavegrass, and 450mg of Uva Ursi Extract, and that’s just the beginning. There’s much more in our heavy-hitting Stage Ready formula to help you rapidly shed excess water weight. You’ll find our ‘Sweat It Out Complex’ will increase the body’s core temperature and speed up the flushing process. Finally, we enhance Stage Ready with critical electrolytes to replenish your body from potentially depleted levels.

PRODUCT BREAKDOWN

When you’re putting everything you have into getting in the best shape of your life, you don’t need excess water retention hiding the valley-deep cuts you’ve been working for. This is the most potent diuretic you can find, and for good reason - the ingredients. Take a look at the synergism and potency of the powerful formula!

Dandelion Extract - 600 mg - This ingredient is also known as “Taraxacum officinale” and helps increase the frequency of urination. Dandelion has a long history of use as a diuretic in Asia, Europe, and the Americas. This impressive plant not only acts as a diuretic, but it also contains vitamins and minerals. One of these is potassium, one of the important electrolyte minerals.(1)

Shave Grass Powder - 550 mg - Also known as Horsetail, this herb has been used for centuries as a diuretic, among many other uses.(2)

Uva Ursi Extract - 450 mg - Uva Ursi, a low growing evergreen shrub, is also known as Bearberry (because bears like to eat the fruit). Among many benefits, Uva Ursi is known for its diuretic properties. Of course, diuretics help you get ripped and ready, but they also help you flush out your body.(3)

Juniper Berry Extract - 200 mg - Like many of the ingredients in the Stage Ready formula, Juniper originates from the evergreen tree. It’s been traditionally used as a spice as well as digestive support.(4)

Buchu Extract - 150 mg - This is a South African plant that supports digestion and acts as a diuretic. Like Uva Ursi, Buchu acts as a detoxifying agent. Of course, 5% Nutrition creates formulas that contain effective ingredients that work synergistically to create a complete approach.(5)

Cranberry Powder - 125 mg - Cranberry is a North American evergreen shrub. It’s also believed to be a potent diuretic, among other benefits.(6)

Green Coffee Bean - 100 mg - This compound is unroasted coffee beans. This means the active ingredient, Chlorogenic Acid, stays intact. What does Chlorogenic Acid do? Preliminary research indicates it can help reduce carbohydrate absorption. Additionally, animal studies have suggested that it improves the function of the hormone adiponectin. This is considered the primary fat-burning hormone in the body.(7,8) These three ingredients work synergistically to signal your fat-burning hormones to burn stored fat for fuel.

Sweat Out Complex

Capsimax Cayenne Pepper Fruit Extract – 50 mg – This is a patented form of Cayenne that contains an active ingredient known as Capsicum. It stimulates an increase in the core temperature of the body (thermogenesis), which means you burn more calories as energy. Capsimax is designed to prevent the burning sensation that regular cayenne pepper can cause.(9,10)

Paradoxine® Grains of Paradise Extract – 30 mg – This plant originates in West Africa and contains an active phenol compound known as 6-paradol. The Paradoxine form of Grains of Paradise is a high quality, stim-free, herbal fat loss ingredient that contains 6-paradol and 6-shogaol. This compound stimulates thermogenesis in B.A.T. or brown adipose tissue and supports mood elevation. It does this by supporting the conversion of stored fat into BAT, which can then be burned as energy by the body.(11)

Electrolyte Matrix - 1382 mg - Calcium Carbonate, Potassium Citrate, Magnesium Oxide, Coconut Water Concentrate

While Stage Ready is a safe, natural way to remove excess water weight, leave it to 5% Nutrition to make sure our formula includes electrolytes to help keep your body hydrated! Compare us to the competition and you will see that most diuretics don’t even think about electrolytes, let alone include them in their formula.

name: Turkesterone 1200
description_html:
Turkesterone has been one of the hottest supplement ingredients on the market. Known for innovation, 5% Nutrition applied state-of-the-art formulation to make this one stand out amongst the rest.

Wait till you check out our Hyper Transport & Absorption Matrix. Get the most absorption possible from this amazing supplement.

What Is Turkesterone And What Does It Do?

Briefly, it’s an ecdysteroid, which is a group of substances that have a structure similar to androgens. Ecdysteroids occur naturally in animals and plants. The similarity to androgens makes it similar to the aggressive supplements many bodybuilders and athletes use.

Turkesterone’s fundamental mode of action is to stimulate protein synthesis. That alone means it fits right in with the 5% family of products.

Ingredient Breakdown

Turkesterone (Ajuga turkestanica) – 1,200mg – As noted, the primary effect of turkesterone is protein synthesis stimulation. There are in-vitro studies on human muscle fibers and animal models that support this. These studies show enhanced growth rates after consuming turkesterone.

Along with increased muscle mass via protein synthesis, turkesterone supports increased strength.

Finally, it has anti-catabolic benefits that help the body preserve muscle during times of calorie restriction. Those are just some of the several impressive benefits that can make a big difference in your workouts and your results.(1,2,3)

Hyper Transport & Absorption Matrix

No matter how impressive a product is, it’s all about absorption. This is where 5% really came through and took it a step farther than everybody else.

AstraGin™ – This is a patented absorption enhancer consisting of astragalus and notoginseng. In fact, it’s one of the most popular and effective absorption enhancers you can use and also promotes a healthy gut.(4)

Cyclodextrin – This is a dietary fiber prebiotic that lowers the glycemic index of food. Cool, right? It also aids in digestion and provides healthy intestinal flora.(5)

Naringin – This is a citrus flavonoid and has antioxidant properties. Natural sources include grapefruit juice. It’s also well known as an absorption enhancer. In addition, it helps extend the half-life of nutrients.

name: ZMA®
description_html:
ZMA® is made up of zinc, magnesium & vitamin B-6. This combination was designed to promote recovery in athletes. 

Zinc plays a major role in maintaining healthy testosterone levels and regulating immune functions. Magnesium supports muscle and nerve functions, electrolyte balance, energy metabolism, and protein synthesis. Vitamin B6 aids in the production of melatonin which helps in getting restful sleep, while the production of serotonin and norepinephrine boosts mood. Research has shown that strenuous exercise will lead to loss of zinc and magnesium through sweat, and why it is essential to restore these minerals to the body.  

Additionally, we added 5mg of Boron to help increase the natural conversion of total testosterone into free testosterone, which contributes to healthy sexual function.
